Name: Hunter SOIL-CLIK Wired Soil Moisture Tensiometer Sensor Module and Probe Kit (SOILCLIK)
Short description:
This sensor prevents water waste by measuring soil moisture and shutting off irrigation when a pre-set level is reached.

  • View current soil moisture level and status at a glance
  • One-touch override allows soil moisture bypass for special conditions
  • Low-voltage outdoor enclosure powered by the host controller
  • Connect to sensor inputs, or use to interrupt common wires in virtually any 24 VAC irrigation system
  • Use with Solar Sync® sensor for maximum water savings
Description:
The Soil-Clik simplifies soil moisture sensing. The Soil-Clik probe uses proven technology to measure moisture within the root zone. When the probe senses that the soil has reached its desired moisture level, it will shut down irrigation, preventing water waste.Soil-Clik has two components: A moisture sensor probe, which is placed in the soil, and an electronic module, which communicates with the probe and the controller. The probe is easy to install – simply bury it to the correct root depth for your plant material. It can be placed up to 1000 feet from the controller. Easy push button operation allows adjustments to the desired moisture level, with an immediate update of actual measurements.The module attaches to all AC-powered Hunter controllers and will work with most other manufacturers' AC-powered controllers. Soil-Clik can be programmed to shut down irrigation when it senses adequate moisture.Backed by Hunter’s 5-year warranty, the Soil-Clik is an effective water-saver either by itself or as a companion with Solar Sync® for an environmentally responsive solution.

Name: Hunter WSS-SEN Wireless Solar Sync ET/Rain/Freeze Weather Sensor Kit (WSSSEN)
Short description:
This sensor automatically adjusts controller run times daily based on local climate conditions to reduce water usage and improve plant health.
  • Automatically adjusts irrigation duration based on weather conditions using on-site solar radiation and air temperature
  • Quick Response® instant rain shutoff and freeze shutoff at 37°F
  • Maintenance-free design with integrated battery for wireless models
  • Adjustable vent ring allows for shorter or longer reset period
  • Rugged polycarbonate housing and metal extension arm
  • Includes gutter bracket and wall mount with wireless models
  • Use with Hunter standard controllers, Centralus™ with ICC2 or ACC2, and IMMS™ online central control installations
Description:
The Solar Sync ET sensor is an advanced weather sensor that calculates evapotranspiration (ET) and adjusts Hunter controllers daily based on local weather conditions. Solar Sync measures sunlight and temperature and uses ET to determine the correct seasonal adjustment percentage value to send to the controller.The controller then uses its programmed run time and adjusts to Solar Sync’s seasonal adjustment value to modify the actual irrigation run time for that day. In addition, the Solar Sync ET sensor integrates Hunter’s popular Rain-Clik™ and Freeze-Clik® sensors providing a quick response in shutting down your irrigation system during rain and/or freezing conditions. The Solar Sync is compatible with most Hunter controllers and applicable to residences, businesses, and municipalities alike.
Add a Solar Sync® Sensor to your Hunter controller to enable automatic smart control and maximize water savings. Solar Sync measures local weather conditions to help the controller fine-tune watering schedules according to exact site needs. Hunter controllers installed with Solar Sync are independently verified to offer an extensive list of water-saving features. Solar Sync is EPA WaterSense® approved.

Name: Hunter Hydrawise HCC HCC-800-M 8 Station (Up to 54) Wi-Fi Controller, Metal Cabinet (HCC800M)
Short description: The next-generation HCC Controller (HCC-800-M) brings the powerful cloud-based irrigation management capabilities of the industry-leading Hydrawise® Platform to high-end residential, commercial, and public-sector projects.
Description:
The next-generation Hydrawise HCC controller brings the powerful Wi-Fi-based irrigation management capabilities of the industry-leading Hydrawise™ platform to high-end residential, commercial, and public-sector projects. The HCC provides a range of convenient features to monitor larger projects — all with the simple click of a button.

The modular Hydrawise HCC Controller provides a range of convenient features to monitor larger projects with up to 54 stations — all with the simple click of a button. A full graphical touchscreen interface allows for programming and manual operation at the controller, with or without Wi-Fi connectivity. For maximum irrigation design flexibility, the controller also offers two-wire compatibility with the Hunter EZ Decoder System (EZDS).

The Hydrawise HCC combines the robust features of the popular Hunter ICC2 controller with automatic, weather-based daily adjustments of Hydrawise programming to create a smart and economical solution for commercial landscape management. Hydrawise HCC can control up to 54 stations* and effectively operate any two stations simultaneously. The controller’s convenient modular design allows for rapid expandability with the same 4-, 8-, and 22-station output modules as the Hunter ICC2. Engineered with a prewired SmartPort®, Hydrawise HCC is also compatible with Hunter’s ROAM and ROAM XL remotes, allowing for fast and reliable manual operation in the field from long-range distances without the need for a smartphone.

With a built-in milliamp sensor, troubleshooting faulty wires is a breeze. Easily install an HC Flow Meter to accurately monitor flow, prevent wasted water, and avoid damaged landscapes.

* Expandable in 4-, 8-, 22-, and 54-station increments

KEY BENEFITS

  • HCC Controller Station Options:
    • Conventional: 8 to 38 (plastic), 8 to 54 (metal and pedestal)*
    • With two-wire EZDS: up to 54 (all enclosure options)
  • The standard programming option allows for 6 independent irrigation programs and 6 start times per program
  • The advanced programming option provides station-based programming with up to 6 total start times available
  • Any 2 programs or stations can operate simultaneously, providing more efficient watering
  • 2 sensor inputs available for use with any Clik sensors and HC Flow Meter
  • 1 P/MV output for pump start relay and master valve activation
  • Wi-Fi enabled for quick connection to Hydrawise software
  • 31/4" full-color touchscreen display for simple programming at the control panel
  • Built-in milliamp sensor for wire fault detection and alerts

OPERATING SPECIFICATIONS

  • Transformer input: 120/230 VAC
  • Transformer output (24 VAC): 1.4 A
  • Station output (24 VAC): 0.56 A
  • P/MV output (24 VAC): 0.56 A
  • 2.4 GHz (only) Wi-Fi router compatible, 802.11 b/g/n 20 MHz
  • Supported security protocols: WPA/WPA2 Personal (only), TLS, SSL
  • Approvals: Plastic Wall Mount IP55 (outdoor), Plastic Pedestal IP24 (outdoor), UL, cUL, FCC, CE, RCM
  • Warranty period: 5 years

TOUCHSCREEN INTERFACE (HCC)

The HCC controller has a full graphical touchscreen interface, which makes programming with or without Wi-Fi connectivity and manual starting from the controller a breeze.

PREDICTIVE WATERING™ ADJUSTMENTS

Hydrawise HCC daily schedules adjustments based on local weather data monitor past, current, and forecasted temperature, rainfall, humidity, and wind speed. This allows for adjustments of watering times and schedules to balance water savings with water efficiency for plants.

FLOW METER DETECTION AND ALERTS (HCC)

Monitor your piping and sprinklers with an optional HC Flow Meter. Receive automatic alerts when a pipe is broken to prevent property damage.

WIRING DETECTION AND ALERTS (HCC)

HCC controllers continuously monitor the electrical current flowing to your solenoid valves. If the current is too high or too low, Hydrawise will alert you and tell you which valve is not working properly. This allows you to correct a failed valve before damage is done to plant materials.

ADVANCED SENSOR PORTS (HCC)

Two general-purpose sensor ports can be used for many different functions. Sensor port works with the Hunter HC flow meters, the Hunter Clik sensor range, and standard rain and soil sensors to stop irrigation. The sensor ports can also start an irrigation cycle. This allows you to create custom starts based on sensor readings.

HYDRAWISE HCC EPA WATERSENSE-APPROVED SMART WATERING

All Hydrawise® enabled controllers are EPA WaterSense® approved. The web-based Hydrawise Platform includes Predictive Watering® Technology that allows the controllers to maximize water savings by adjusting irrigation schedules according to forecast temperature, rainfall probability, wind speed, and humidity.

Manage Landscape Irrigation from Anywhere with the Wi-Fi Enabled HCC Controller and
Hydrawise Platform Achieve maximum efficiency when you combine Hydrawise cloud-based software with Hydrawise HCC irrigation controllers. The powerful Hydrawise platform equips you with the tools you need to successfully manage residential applications.

Predictive Watering technology adjusts schedules based on temperature forecast, rainfall probability, wind speed, and humidity to maximize water savings while keeping landscapes healthy and beautiful. Hydrawise monitors field wiring to call attention to maintenance needs before costly landscape damage occurs. For the highest level of protection, add a simple-to-install HC Flow Meter to alert you of broken pipes or sprinklers.

Description: ICC2 is a value-packed, light-to-mid-size commercial irrigation controller that delivers more than you expect, just like its famous predecessor. It is designed to control larger projects (up to 54 stations) and offers the water savings you expect from a Hunter controller.ICC2 can run any two of its four automatic programs simultaneously. Optional matching metal pedestals in gray or stainless are also available.

Name: Hunter NODE 1 Station Battery Controller with DC Solenoid (NODE-100)
Short description: The Hunter NODE battery controller for isolated sites and power-restricted areas. The Hunter NODE mounts to a valve's solenoid quickly and easily, and without screws, drills, or additional wires. The unit's solid construction and fully waterproof exterior ensure it can handle the harsh environment of any valve box. The Hunter NODE is powered by one or two 9V alkaline batteries and provides standard or extended power throughout the season. Along with exceptional reliability, the Hunter NODE features an easy-to-program LCD screen, the ability to control a Pump Master Valve, and is faster to program with Hunter NODE's simple wizard with 3 programs and 4 start times per program. The array of programming options and rugged reliability make the NODE a compact, but powerful irrigation controller with the flexibility of battery or solar power.
Description:
The Hunter NODE battery controller for isolated sites and power-restricted areas. The Hunter NODE mounts to a valve's solenoid quickly and easily, and without screws, drills, or additional wires. The unit's solid construction and fully waterproof exterior ensure it can handle the harsh environment of any valve box. The Hunter NODE is powered by one or two 9V alkaline batteries and provides standard or extended power throughout the season. Along with exceptional reliability, the Hunter NODE features an easy-to-program LCD screen, the ability to control a Pump Master Valve, and is faster to program with Hunter NODE's simple wizard with 3 programs and 4 start times per program. The array of programming options and rugged reliability make the NODE a compact, but powerful irrigation controller with the flexibility of battery or solar power.

KEY BENEFITS

  • Number of stations 1
  • Battery-operated controller for automatic irrigation without AC power
  • Battery-life indicator for battery replacement
  • Waterproof enclosure seal protects against water ingress
  • 3 flexible programs with 4 start times each and up to 6-hour run times
  • Suspend irrigation up to 99 days during the off-season
  • Easy Retrieve™ memory backs up the full irrigation schedule if ever changed
  • Seasonal adjustment for quicker schedule adjustments without changing run times
  • Solar panel provides maintenance-free operation
  • Mounts to Hunter solenoids, pipes, flat surfaces, or inside the valve box

Operating Specifications

  • One or two 9V alkaline batteries or 1800 mAh solar panels with charging cell
  • Operates Hunter DC-latching solenoids (P/N 458200)
  • 100' maximum wire runs, 18 AWG wire only
  • Station output: 9–11 VDC
  • P/MV output: 9–11 VDC (multi-station models)
  • Sensor inputs: 2 (wired soil plus wired rain, freeze, or wind only)
  • Approvals: IP68 (submersible), UL, cUL, FCC, CE, RCM, ISED
  • Warranty period: 2 years

Name: Hunter Hydrawise Pro-HC 6-Zone Outdoor Wi-Fi Controller (PHC600)
Short description:
The Hunter PRO-HC Fixed Indoor Controller with Hydrawise is a dynamic irrigation management tool that introduces real-time visibility into leaks and breaks in order to minimize damage. With a predictive watering feature, it is excellent for changing run times according to wind, humidity, and rainfall probability, leading to significant water savings. It is Wi-Fi enabled for a simple and fast connection to the internet.

  • Dedicated master valve/pump start
  • Built-in milliamp sensor across the full range of controllers
Description:
Manage the Hydrawise Pro-HC irrigation controller with Hydrawise web-based software from anywhere worldwide using your smart device or web browser. Predictive watering adjusts schedules based on temperature forecasts, rainfall probability, wind, and humidity to provide maximum water savings while keeping your clients’ landscapes healthy and beautiful. Add a simple-to-install flow meter and set up automatic notifications to alert you of broken pipes or sprinklers.

KEY BENEFITS

  • Number of stations 6
  • The standard programming option allows for 6 independent irrigation programs and 6 start times per program
  • The advanced programming option provides station-based programming with up to 6 total start times available
  • 2 sensor inputs available for use with any Clik sensor and HC Flow Meter
  • 1 P/MV output for pump start relay and master valve activation
  • Wi-Fi enabled for quick connection to Hydrawise software
  • 2¾" full-color touchscreen display for simple programming at the control panel
  • Built-in milliamp sensor for wire fault detection and alerts

OPERATING SPECIFICATIONS

  • Transformer input: 120 VAC
  • Transformer output (24 VAC): 1 A
  • Station output (24 VAC): 0.56 A
  • P/MV output (24 VAC): 0.28 A
  • 2.4 GHz (only) Wi-Fi router compatible, 802.11 b/g/n 20 MHz
  • Supported security protocols: WPA/WPA2 Personal and Enterprise, TLS, SSL
  • Approvals: Plastic IP44 (outdoor), UL, cUL, FCC, CE, RCM
  • Warranty period: 2 years

TOUCHSCREEN INTERFACE (PRO-HC)

The Pro-HC controller has a full graphical touchscreen interface, which makes programming with or without Wi-Fi connectivity and manual starting from the controller a breeze.

PREDICTIVE WATERING™ ADJUSTMENTS

Hydrawise Pro-HC daily schedule adjustments based on local weather data monitor past, current, and forecasted temperature, rainfall, humidity, and wind speed. This allows for adjustments of watering times and schedules to balance water savings with water efficiency for plants.

FLOW METER DETECTION AND ALERTS (PRO-HC)

Monitor your piping and sprinklers with an optional HC Flow Meter. Receive automatic alerts when a pipe is broken to prevent property damage.

WIRING DETECTION AND ALERTS (PRO-HC)

Pro-HC controllers continuously monitor the electrical current flowing to your solenoid valves. If the current is too high or too low, Hydrawise will alert you and tell you which valve is not working properly. This allows you to correct a failed valve before damage is done to plant materials.

ADVANCED SENSOR PORTS (PRO-HC)

Two general-purpose sensor ports can be used for many different functions. Sensor port works with the Hunter HC flow meters, the Hunter Clik sensor range, and standard rain and soil sensors to stop irrigation. The sensor ports can also start an irrigation cycle. This allows you to create custom starts based on sensor readings.

HYDRAWISE PRO-HC EPA WATERSENSE-APPROVED SMART WATERING

All Hydrawise® enabled controllers are EPA WaterSense® approved. The web-based Hydrawise Platform includes Predictive Watering® Technology that allows the controllers to maximize water savings by adjusting irrigation schedules according to forecast temperature, rainfall probability, wind speed, and humidity.

Manage Landscape Irrigation from Anywhere with the Wi-Fi Enabled Pro-HC Controller and
Hydrawise Platform Achieve maximum efficiency when you combine Hydrawise cloud-based software with Hunter Pro-HC irrigation controllers. The powerful Hydrawise platform equips you with the tools you need to successfully manage residential applications.

Predictive Watering technology adjusts schedules based on temperature forecast, rainfall probability, wind speed, and humidity to maximize water savings while keeping landscapes healthy and beautiful. Hydrawise monitors field wiring to call attention to maintenance needs before costly landscape damage occurs. For the highest level of protection, add a simple-to-install HC Flow Meter to alert you of broken pipes or sprinklers.

Name: Hunter Drip ECO-MAT 17mm Subsurface Drip Mat 32” x 100’ Roll (ECOMAT17100)
Short description:
Irrigate plants below the root zone for maximum efficiency with a combination of fleece-wrapped dripline and fleece blanket

  • Anti-siphon feature and fleece wrap protect against debris and root intrusion
  • Saves 20–40% more water than standard products due to superior capillary movement of water to the entire root zone, promoting healthier root growth
  • Non-draining, pressure-compensating emitters open/close simultaneously, maximizing efficiency
  • Check the height of 6' minimizes system drainage and runoff
Description:
Designed to suit a variety of hard-to-irrigate areas, the Eco-Mat uses a specifically engineered combination of inline emitter tubing and fleece, which evenly disperses water from under the surface. Eco-Mat consists of Hunter's specialized fleece-wrapped inline emitter tubing (Eco-Wrap), attached to specialized fleece. Eco-Mat is then installed in the soil to be irrigated, directly under the plant material. When water is emitted, the Eco-Wrap fills and in turn, saturates the Eco-Mat. The Eco-Mat not only makes subsurface drip a viable solution, but it also makes it a great one. Since there's never water on the surface, high-traffic turf areas in places like amusement parks, city parks, and commercial complexes can be used all day without the need to budget time for overhead irrigation or worry about vandalism.

OPERATING SPECIFICATIONS

  • Operating range: 15 to 50 PSI
  • Minimum filtration: 120 mesh (125 microns)
  • Compatible with LOC and 17 mm insert barb fittings
  • Air relief is recommended for sloping conditions greater than 6'
  • Recommended installation depth: turf (4" to 6"); other (4" to 14")
  • May use in conjunction with Eco-Wrap System
  • Warranty period: 5 years (plus 2 additional years for environmental stress cracking)

PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS

  • Flow rate: 0.6 GPH; 0.83 in/hr
  • Emitter spacing: 12"
  • Lateral row spacing: 14"
  • Product width: 32"
  • Roll length: mini roll = 100'; standard roll = 295'
  • Tubing dimensions: 0.660" x 0.560" (outside/inside diameter)
  • Water-holding capacity: 0.5 gallons
  • The approximate coverage per roll: mini roll = 250 ft2;
    Standard roll = 737 ft2

    Roll = Irrigated landscape area = Qty. Area of roll coverage
    3,200 ft2

Name: Hunter FS3000 Field Servers 3,000 Data Points for BACnet, Modbus, RESTful API on SCADA, Smart City, and BMS (FS-3000)
Short description:
• FS3000 Field servers for BACnet, Modbus, RESTful API, and over 120 other automation protocols
  • Up to 3,000 data points with complete documentation and demo software with Hunter license agreement
  • Integrates controllers directly into SCADA, Smart City, and BMS applications
  • Allows total access to all controller commands, reports, and features from the customer’s integration software
  • Does not require an internet connection or other proprietary control software
  • 2 x RJ-45 receptacles for system and controller connections
  • 1 x RS-485/RS-232 and 1 x RS-485
  • DIN rail mounting included
Description:
The Hunter FS-3000 Field Server connects the irrigation system to a configurable building and industrial automation gateway. Integrators can easily interface irrigation control from Hunter ACC2 and ICC2 Controllers to networks in commercial buildings, industrial plants, and smart cities. The field server provides complete and direct access to all controller commands and reports in BACnet, Modbus, RESTful API, and many other automation network types.

The field servers do not require an internet connection, and they allow integrators to create personalized commands and interactions within their custom control dashboards. The products come with complete documentation and access to demo/tutorial/starter software if desired. The FS-3000 may be rack-mounted with an included DIN rail mount or placed in individual controller enclosures. The field servers are designed to connect to Hunter A2CLAN or LANKIT Modules, or the A2C-WIFI Module for wireless connectivity.

OPERATING SPECIFICATIONS

  • Serial (galvanic isolation): 1 x RS-485/RS-232 and 1 x RS-485
  • Baud: 9600, 19200, 38400, 57600, 76800, 115000
  • Ethernet: 2 x 10/100BaseT, MDIX, DHCP
  • Operating temperature: -4°F to 158°F (-20°C to 70°C)
  • Relative humidity: 10% to 95% RH non-condensing

Name: Hunter Pro-C PC-400i Indoor Modular 4 Station Controller (PC400i)
Short description:
Hunter Pro-C Modular Indoor Irrigation Controller Gray 4-Station Base Unit Controller, Outdoor Mount with 120 VAC Internal Transformer, Expandable to 16 zones.

  • Flexible irrigation management for a range of station counts and applications
  • Modular Pro-C Controller: conventional wiring from 4 to 23 stations
  • Hybrid EZ Decoder option: up to 32 total stations; 28 stations max. if two-wire only
  • 3 independent irrigation programs with 4 start times each allow for fully customized scheduling
  • 1 sensor input available for use with the Hunter Solar Sync Sensor or any Hunter Clik sensors
  • 1 P/MV output for pump start relay and master valve activation
  • Dedicated Solar Sync dial position available to maximize water savings
Description:
Since 2001, the Hunter Pro-C has been the contractor’s choice in residential irrigation control. The Hunter Pro-C has proven to be the most reliable and robust controller in the industry, with the flexibility to expand on demand due to its modular design.

The Hunter Pro-C can easily accommodate Hunter’s Solar Sync® without additional wiring. The new Solar Sync dial position makes upgrading and programming any Hunter Pro-C to smart control easy. The Hunter Solar Sync is an EPA WaterSense® labeled smart device which calculates evapotranspiration (ET) and adjusts Hunter controllers daily based on local weather conditions, resulting in water savings and conservation.

The Hunter Pro-C and all AC-powered Hunter controllers are now EPA WaterSense labeled when paired with the Solar Sync weather sensor.

FEATURES

  • Number of stations: 4

  • Independent irrigation programs: 3

  • Independent lighting programs: 3

  • Start times per program: 4

  • Max. station run time: 6 hours

  • Solar Sync dial position: now available with built-in Solar Sync programming for increased installation efficiency

  • Solar Sync delay feature: allows adjustments to be postponed for up to 99 days

  • Cycle and Soak feature built-in: reduces runoff

  • Lighting programs built in: allows the ability to add landscape lighting control

  • Added knockouts offer additional flexibility

  • Programmable rain delay: prevents watering for an extended period as needed

  • Non-volatile memory: keeps programs indefinitely— without battery backup

  • Rain sensor bypass: allows the controller to ignore sensor devices when needed

  • One-touch manual start and advance: allows user to start or test any station

  • Warranty period: 2 years

ADVANCED FEATURES IN HUNTER PRO-C

WATERSENSE® SMART WATERING CONTROLLER BY ADDING SOLAR SYNC

Add a Solar Sync® Sensor to your Hunter controller to enable automatic smart control and maximize water savings. Solar Sync measures local weather conditions to help the controller fine-tune watering schedules according to exact site needs. Hunter controllers installed with Solar Sync are independently verified to offer an extensive list of water-saving features. Solar Sync is EPA WaterSense® approved. Click here to learn more about Smart Controllers

EASY RETRIEVE™ MEMORY

A manual backup utility that stores complete controller scheduling and setup information in backup memory.

AUTOMATIC SHORT CIRCUIT PROTECTION

Automatic short circuit protection is a feature found in all Hunter AC-powered controllers. This feature automatically detects electrical faults, which are typically caused by wiring issues. Only affected stations are skipped, allowing all other stations to water normally as programmed.

QUICK CHECK™

The QuickCheck feature makes field wiring issues easy to assess with the push of a button. QuickCheck displays an ERR message when a field wiring short is detected on a particular station number.

SEASONAL ADJUSTMENT: GLOBAL OR AUTOMATIC UPDATES WITH SOLAR SYNC

This feature allows for quick adjustment to irrigation run times based on seasonal weather conditions.

Global: The Global option provides a Seasonal Adjustment percentage to all station Run Times on all of the controller's Programs.

Daily: With the addition of a Solar Sync ET Sensor, the controller has the ability to automatically implement daily adjustments based on measured local weather.

DELAY BETWEEN STATIONS

Users can program a delay between stations as the controller advances from one station to the next. This delay can range from a few seconds (to permit slow-closing valves additional time to close) to a much longer period of time (to allow pressure tanks time to recharge), based on user requirements.

SENSOR PROGRAMMABILITY

The ability to specify which program will be shut down in response to a specific sensor alarm. This allows programs unaffected by the sensor to continue automatic operations.

NON-WATER DAYS

Day(s) of the week can be programmed OFF in advance so that irrigation does not occur regardless of program interval schedules. For example, if the gardener mows the lawn on Saturday, the Non-Water Days feature allows Saturday to be programmed OFF so that watering will not occur.

Simple programming and flexible station expansion make the Pro-C Controller the professional’s choice for residential and light commercial irrigation systems.

Modular Expansion and Flexibility - Base 4-station controller with multiple plug-in output module options3-, 9-, and 16-station conventional output modules available for flexible station counts

EZ Decoder Capable for Two-Wire Control - Compatible with PC-DM Decoder Output Module for simple, reliable two-wire control with EZ-1 DecodersHybrid conventional/two-wire control in the same chassis for up to 32 total stations two-wire only, 28 EZ-1 Decoder stations are available flexible, affordable two-wire control in a compact package.

Add a Solar Sync Sensor to Maximize Water Savings - Dedicated Solar Sync dial position enables smart water savings automatic ET adjustments based on local temperature, rainfall, and solar radiation add a Solar Sync Sensor to your Hunter Pro-C Controller to create a smart, EPA WaterSense Certified, water-saving irrigation control solution.

Gain Long-Range Control with Hunter ROAM Remotes - Enable convenient, long-range manual operation, maintenance, and service for quick and easy system inspections and maintenance, Hunter ROAM and ROAM XL Remotes help save time and labor on the Jobsite

Name: Hunter I-Core IC600PL 6 Station (Up to 42) Indoor/Outdoor Plastic Wall Mount Controller (IC-600-PL)
Short description:
• 6-Station Controller
  • Real-time flow monitoring
  • One-touch manual start and advance, allows the user to start or test any station
  • Quick check makes field wiring issues easy to assess with the push of a button
  • Non-volatile memory keeps programs indefinitely without battery backup
  • Automatic short circuit protection
  • Sensor programmability
Description:
The I-Core is Hunter’s controller for demanding commercial and high-end residential applications. Loaded with innovative features like state-of-the-art flow monitoring, quick system overview access, a factory-installed SmartPort®, six language capability, and a bold, backlit display, the I-Core should be considered for most high-end irrigation projects.

A big reason the I-Core is so unique is its sheer versatility. The plastic cabinet version is expandable from 6 to 30 stations, and the metal cabinet model can handle up to 42. Adding a DUAL® two-wire module can even expand station capability to 48. Stainless steel and pedestal models are also available, providing a broad range of enclosure choices. With other add-on options like a ROAM or ROAM XL remote and the built-in conservation-focused Solar-Sync®, I-Core’s possibilities are all but limitless.

  • Number of stations:
    • Conventional: 6 to 30 (plastic), 6 to 42 (metal and pedestals)
    • With DUAL® decoder: up to 48
  • 4 independent irrigation programs (8 start times each) allow for customized scheduling
  • 12-hour maximum station run time provides flexibility for lower-flow zones
  • Any 2 programs can operate simultaneously for more efficient watering
  • Sensor inputs:
  • 2 (plastic)
  • 3 (metal and pedestals)
  • 1 P/MV output for pump start relay and master valve activation
  • Flow-monitoring capabilities provide real-time water usage data
  • Programmable No Water Window prevents all irrigation for a specified time frame
  • High-visibility, backlit display with 6 selectable languages

ADVANCED FEATURES

WATERSENSE® SMART WATERING CONTROLLER BY ADDING SOLAR SYNC

Add a Solar Sync® Sensor to your Hunter controller to enable automatic smart control and maximize water savings. Solar Sync measures local weather conditions to help the controller fine-tune watering schedules according to exact site needs. Hunter controllers installed with Solar Sync are independently verified to offer an extensive list of water-saving features. Solar Sync is EPA WaterSense® approved. Click here to learn more about Smart Controllers

REAL-TIME FLOW MONITORING

This feature permits the connection of a flow meter to recognize high or low flow conditions and react automatically to alarms. The controller learns typical flows for each zone of irrigation and then monitors performance during automatic irrigation. When incorrect flows are detected, the controller can identify the faulty station and shut it down. Alarm parameters are user-programmable. Flow totals are recorded in controller memory to report system water usage.

EASY RETRIEVE™ MEMORY

A manual backup utility that stores complete controller scheduling and setup information in backup memory.

ONE-TOUCH MANUAL START AND ADVANCE

Allows any program to be started manually by simply pressing and holding the right arrow key.

PROGRAMMABLE RAIN DELAY

The Programmable Rain Delay feature enables a user-specified number of days to keep the controller in the OFF mode, following a local rain storm. This will prevent watering during inclement weather and reverts to automatic scheduled irrigation once the delay period elapses.

QUICK CHECK™

The QuickCheck feature makes field wiring issues easy to assess with the push of a button. QuickCheck displays an ERR message when a field wiring short is detected on a particular station number.

NON-VOLATILE MEMORY

This feature offers protection against unreliable power, retaining current time, date, and program data.

AUTOMATIC SHORT CIRCUIT PROTECTION

Automatic short circuit protection is a feature found in all Hunter AC-powered controllers. This feature automatically detects electrical faults, which are typically caused by wiring issues. Only affected stations are skipped, allowing all other stations to water normally as programmed.

SEASONAL ADJUSTMENT: GLOBAL, MONTHLY, AND SOLAR SYNC FOR I-CORE

This feature allows for quick adjustments to irrigation run times through a percentage scale. During peak season, set the seasonal adjustment to 100%. If weather conditions require less water, enter the appropriate percentage value (i.e. 50%) to cut down irrigation run times without the need to adjust each station in the program. The I-Core offers three different ways to use Seasonal Adjustments to reduce water usage:

Global: Provides a seasonal adjustment value to all selected programs.

Monthly: Allows users to program a seasonal adjustment value for each month of the year. This is exclusively available on the I-Core and works by automatically changing the programmed seasonal adjustment value on the first day of every month.

Solar Sync: When connected to the I-Core, the Solar Sync ET sensor implements an automatic daily adjustment based on measured local weather.

DELAY BETWEEN STATIONS FOR I-CORE AND ACC

Users can program a delay between stations as the controller advances from one station to the next. This delay can range from a few seconds (to permit slow-closing valves additional time to close) to a much longer period of time (to allow pressure tanks time to recharge), based on user requirements. In ACC and I-Core, Delay Between Stations may be set by individual programs.

SENSOR PROGRAMMABILITY FOR I-CORE

The Sensor Programmability feature allows the user to specify which stations should shut down in response to a sensor alarm, allowing specified stations or programs to run uninterrupted in the event of a sensor alarm.

CYCLE AND SOAK

This water-saving feature allows the operator to specify a maximum cycle time for each station, followed by a minimum soak time, to prevent runoff from slopes or saturated soil. The operator can enter any run time, and the controller will automatically divide it into cycles to allow the water to be absorbed during the soak periods. The feature is adjustable for each individual station or Block of stations for unique soil and site conditions.

NO WATER WINDOW

User-specified periods of time during which the controller will not allow automatic irrigation. No Water Window can be used to comply with local watering restrictions or to prevent conflicts with pedestrian traffic. This setting does not affect manual watering options for local maintenance.

NON-WATER DAYS

Day(s) of the week can be programmed OFF in advance so that irrigation does not occur regardless of program interval schedules. For example, if the gardener mows the lawn on Saturday, the Non-Water Days feature allows Saturday to be programmed OFF so that watering will not occur.

SOLAR SYNC™ DELAY

Solar Sync Delay allows the installer to specify the number of days before automatic weather adjustment begins. This allows a period of non-adjusted irrigation for grow-in or plant establishment purposes, without requiring a return visit to the site to enable the Solar Sync water-saving feature.

MULTI-LANGUAGE PROGRAMMING

I-Core can be programmed in English, Spanish, French, Italian, German, and Portuguese.

TOTAL RUN TIME CALCULATOR

This calculates the total duration of a program, based on all of its station run times. This can be used to calculate the end time of a program.

Short description:

Name: FX Luminaire RS-LED20W-FL-WI RS Up Light MR-16 20W Wide Flood LED Weathered Iron Finish (RS-LED20W-FL-WI)
Short description:
The Core of the FX Up Light Family. The RS allows designers to use different lamps to create custom effects while maintaining consistency in style. With knowledge of the science and art of lighting, a professional designer can choose a lamp source to suit the desired effect or emotional response.

  • Die-cast zinc/aluminum alloy
  • TGIC powder coat finish
  • MR-16 lamp type
  • Compatible with Luxor® technology
  • ProAim™ adjustability
  • Input voltage: 10-15V
Description:
FX Luminaire is an industry-leading manufacturer of landscape and architectural lighting products with a focus on the advancement of LED technology and digital lighting control with zoning, dimming, and color adjustment capabilities. We offer a full spectrum of specification-driven lighting fixtures that can be utilized to create elegant, cutting-edge landscape lighting systems for commercial or residential applications. Our products are available exclusively via our extensive professional distributor network.

Materials - Zinc/aluminum alloy housing, shroud, and knuckle with stainless steel hardware.

Knuckle - Machined brass knuckle with ½"-14 (13 mm) NPSM threads. Compress and lock features prevent slip after installation. Complete adjustability over 220° of vertical adjustment.

Lamp - GU5.3 lamp base. Preinstalled LED MR-16 with Cree LEDs offers a warm 2,700K color temperature with a minimum rated life (L90) of 40,000 hours.

Optics - Stainless steel spring in the housing ensures the lamp and additional lenses stay flush against the glass lens, optimizing output and beam angles. Recess the lamp farther inside the housing to hide additional glare with the Recessor Ring (specify separately). For additional color filters, spread lenses, hex baffles, etc., use MR-16 sized accessories (MR-16: 2" (50 mm) dia. x 1 mm thickness).

Finish - Durable polyester TGIC powder coat finish, providing superior outdoor weathering in all conditions. Tested to ASTM standards.

Hardware - Stainless steel angle lock screw. Includes 10" (254 mm) ABS slotted installation spike.

Wiring - 18 AWG (1 mm); SPT-1W; 220°F (105°C); 300V; 10' (3 m) length.

Sockets - MR16 GU5.3 socket with retaining clips. Ceramic socket base with a heat-resistant contact pad. Stainless steel retaining clips ensure high spring force retention.

Power - Input 10–15 VAC/VDC, 50/60 Hz. Remote transformer required (specify separately).

Shroud - Die-cast zinc/aluminum alloy shroud with 15° (standard) or 45° (long shroud) cutoff options.

Weight - 2.6 lbs. (1.2 kg).

Housing - Die-cast zinc/aluminum alloy housing with a capacity for one (1) standard MR-16 lamp.

Lens - Tempered, low-iron, soda-lime glass lens with shock resistance and high tolerance for thermal expansion and stress.

Ambient Operating Temperature - 0°F to 140°F (-18°C to 60°C).

Sustainability - Innovation meets conservation in the design and manufacturing of our products. Where we can, we use recycled materials while maintaining superior functionality. Our LED products provide high- quality light at optimal energy efficiency, lifespan, and durability.

Installation Requirements - Designed for installation in the upward direction only. Use waterproof, weather resistant wire connectors.

Control - ZD option utilizes Luxor technology to zone light fixtures in up to 250 groups, and dim each group in 1% increments between 0 and 100%. An installed Luxor controller is required to perform these actions.

Manufacturing - ISO 9001:2015 certified facility. Fixture assembled in Mexico; lamp made in China.

Warranty - 10-year limited warranty on fixture; 5-year limited warranty on preinstalled FX Luminaire LED lamp.

HYDRAWISE EPA WATERSENSE APPROVED SMART WATERING

Hydrawise Predictive Watering allows the controller to adjust schedules based on forecasted temperature, rainfall probability, wind, and humidity to provide the maximum water savings you come to expect from a Hunter smart controller.

Eco-Indicator, drip system pressure indicator, 6" pop-up

  • Indication of system operation: above 12 PSI

Description:
\n

The Eco-Indicator is a robust device that will indicate when the system is currently in operation. At 12 psi, the riser will pop up displaying a bright yellow stem. This commercial-grade body attaches to either polyethylene or PVC through a 1/2" NPT connection thus avoiding 1/4" tubing. This adds durability to the system that no other indicator can boast. When the system is not active, the Eco-Indicator will be in its retracted state and flush to the ground.

Short description:
• Fit your varying needs with these 6-station modules
  • Unique module design allows servicing of the module without removing field wires from the controller
  • Fits I-Core plastic and metal cabinets
Description:
\n

The I-Core is Hunter’s controller for demanding commercial and high-end residential applications. Loaded with innovative features like state-of-the-art flow monitoring, quick system overview access, a factory-installed SmartPort, six language capability, and a bold, backlit display, the I-Core should be considered for most high-end irrigation projects. A big reason the I-Core is so unique is its sheer versatility. The plastic cabinet version is expandable from 6 to 30 stations, and the metal cabinet model can handle up to 42. Adding a DUAL two-wire module can even expand station capability to 48. Stainless steel and pedestal models are also available, providing a broad range of enclosure choices. With other add-on options like a ROAM or ROAM XL remote and the built-in conservation-focused Solar-Sync, I-Core’s possibilities are all but limitless.

\n

Name: Hunter XC Hybrid XCH-600-SSP 6-Station Stainless Steel Solar Battery Controller (XCH600SSP)
Short description:
• Zones: 6
  • Expandability: Fixed
  • Operates with DC Latching Solenoids ONLY (P/N 458200)
Description:
The XC Hybrid Controller delivers extensive power without the plug. Built with efficient water management features, the XC Hybrid operates DC-latching solenoids using solar energy, ambient light or battery power. XC Hybrid can also be powered with a 24VAC plug-in adapter using DC-latching solenoids. Ready for both indoor or outdoor installations, the XC Hybrid is available in 6- and 12-station plastic or stainless steel models meaning it’s the right solution for a wide range of residential and commercial applications including residential areas, parks, gardens, roadway medians, and roundabouts. With ‘Easy Retrieve’ memory backup and onboard, non-volatile memory, you’ve got the assurance to recall all of the controller’s watering programs.

KEY BENEFITS

  • Number of stations: 6
  • Stainless steel enclosure protects against vandalism
  • 3 programs with 4 start times each and up to 4-hour run times
  • Suspend irrigation for up to 99 days during the off-season
  • Easy Retrieve™ memory backs up the full irrigation schedule
  • Delay Between Stations for slow-closing valves or pump recharge
  • Seasonal adjustment for quicker schedule adjustments without changing run times
  • Solar Panel provides maintenance-free operation
  • Mounts to flat surfaces or steel posts
Categories: Shop Products > Irrigation > Controllers & Timers, Shop Products > Irrigation, Shop Products, Shop Products > Irrigation > Controllers & Timers > Solar Controllers
Tags: battery controller, battery timer, hunter industries, irrigation controller, solar controller, xc hybrid controller, xch controller, XCH-600-SSP, XCH600SSP

Name: FX Luminaire 10 Piece RS & PL LED Landscape Lighting Kit, Bronze Finish, Wi-Fi Control (FX-10-KIT-BZ-PL-SMART-WIRE)
Short description:
Kit Includes:
6x – FX Luminaire 4W MR16 2700K Flood Bronze RS Aluminum Up Light (RS-LED20W-FL-BZ)
4x – FX Luminaire 2W G4 2700K 12 in. Bronze PL Aluminum Path Light (PL-LED20W-12R-BZ)
1x – FX Luminaire 150W Matte Finish Transformer (EX-150M)
1x – Brilliance Smart Socket 3.0 Wi-Fi Control Plug
20x – Black/Gray Waterproof Connectors
100′ – 12 gauge 2 conductor direct burial wire
Description:
RS Up Light
The Core of the FX Up Light Family. The RS allows designers to use different lamps to create custom effects while maintaining consistency in style. With knowledge of the science and art of lighting, a professional designer can choose a lamp source to suit the desired effect or emotional response.

  • Die-cast zinc/aluminum alloy
  • TGIC powder coat finish
  • MR-16 lamp type
  • Compatible with Luxor® technology
  • ProAim™ adjustability
  • Input voltage: 10-15V

PL Path Light
The wider angle of the PL allows broader lighting for larger spaces. It is made of aluminum, and while it may be a lighter-weight construction, it can still be relied on to thoroughly illuminate anything in its path. The aesthetic design of the PL was created to complement the landscape and add to the overall ambiance.

  • Die-cast aluminum
  • Two-layer marine-grade anodization and powder coat finish
  • Cree® Integrated LEDs
  • ProAim™ adjustability
  • Color temperature filters
  • Compatible with Luxor® technology
  • Phase and PWM dimmable
  • Input voltage: 10-15V

EX Transformer
The EX transformer provides an economical, low-wattage power and control option for LED lighting projects.

  • 150 watts
  • Single 15-volt output tap
  • Compact design
  • Powder-coated steel or stainless steel options
  • Compatible with most plug-in astronomical timers and photocells

Winterization is quick and easy and can be accomplished with only one worker. A mid-range solution for residential and commercial applications, the Roam will operate up to 1,000 feet from the controller. It is compatible with all Hunter AC-powered controllers. The Roam offers features other remotes do not, at a reasonable price. With a large LCD and simple push-button operation, this remote is easy to use and small enough to fit in your pocket.

\n

Name: Hunter A2C-LTEM Cellular Communication Module (4G LTE) for ACC2 Controllers (A2CLTEM)
Short description:
• Cellular Communication Module (4G LTE) for ACC2 Controllers; service plan required
  • Enables Centralus Central Control Clooud Management for Hunter ACC and ACC2 Commercial Controllers via cellular technology
Description:
The A2C-LTE-M cellular communication module includes a pre-registered SIM card for use in Hunter controllers only. The card will not work in other devices. This SIM card requires a service plan. The controller setup process will include simple steps for entering secure billing and payment information.

If your organization requires you to use a different plan or account, the SIM card must be replaced with one supplied by your organization. You will be required to enter the Access Point Name (APN) used by your organization in the controller setup screens. The original ACC2 face pack could not support a cellular module. If the controller detects an incompatible cell module, a warning message will appear in the controller display, as shown below.

If the module will be used to connect the controller to the internet, a Hunter Centralus™ account is required to complete the final controller configuration in the software application. Visit centralus.hunterindustries.com to set up a free Hunter account in advance so your installation can be completed and tested.

Name: Hunter 1 Station WVL-100 Wireless Valve Link (WVL100)
Short description:
Enable convenient wireless valve control for ICC2 and HCC Controllers with the highly flexible and easy-to-install Wireless Valve Link.

  • Works with Hunter ICC2 and HCC Controllers, compatible with Centralus and Hydrawise Irrigation Management Platforms
  • Add up to 54 valves plus P/MV up to 2,000' line of sight*
  • License-free LoRa wireless connections direct to valve box — no copper field wiring required
  • Wireless Solar Repeater (RPT) can extend or double ranges
  • Seamless system expansion enables connection across hardscapes and other obstacles without wiring
  • Combine with conventional ICM or EZDS Modules as needed (54 stations plus P/MV maximum per controller)
  • Isolation from lightning or surge events in the field
  • No field wires, wire breaks, or tracking
  • No cutting into hardscape, plowing, boring, or lightning surge back to the controller
Description:
Enable convenient wireless valve control for ICC2 and HCC Controllers with the highly flexible and easy-to-install Wireless Valve Link.

The Wireless Valve Link product family eliminates some of the biggest contractor costs in irrigation installations: copper wire and unnecessary excavation to connect or repair distant valves. Like decoders, it replaces commodity wire with Hunter ingenuity and provides an efficient alternative to activating irrigation valves. Once connected, wireless signals are immune to issues that commonly afflict wired systems, such as wire degradation and lightning damage.

With the Wireless Valve Link, you can add valves up to 2,000' (or more with a repeater)* without the need for new valve wiring. Often described as a wireless decoder system, the Wireless Valve Link provides a flexible solution for complex landscapes. Now it’s possible to cross concrete sidewalks and asphalt driveways wirelessly, saving time and money during installation.

This convenient and innovative wireless valve technology simplifies installation for landscapes of all sizes by eliminating the need to run costly field wires or cut into hardscape.

* Wireless range is subject to terrain, foliage, buildings, and other site factors. Consult product documentation before installing.

  • Low-profile, waterproof valve box lid mount for field durability
    • Requires 1½" diameter hole in valve box lid (hole saw supplied with WVOM)
  • Two-way communications confirm field performance
  • 900 MHz LoRa radio (North America only)
  • 1-, 2-, and 4-station configurations to optimize field installations
  • Operates Hunter DC-Latching Solenoids
  • Maximum distance from WVL to solenoid: 100' with 18 AWG wire
  • One or two 9 VDC batteries per WVL
    • Replace batteries once per season or year
    • Solar recharging option with SP-WVL
  • Built-in site survey and manual test functions
  • Easy, free setup with Bluetooth app (iOS 9.0 or above, Android 5.0 or above)
  • Approvals:
    • WVL in-box control links: IP68 (submersible)
    • RPT Wireless Solar Repeater: IP55 (outdoor)
    • UL, cUL, FCC, CE, UKCA, RCM, ISED
  • Warranty period: 2 years
Categories: Shop Products > Irrigation > Controllers & Timers, Shop Products > Irrigation, Shop Products, Shop Products > Irrigation > Controllers & Timers > Wireless Valve Controllers

  • Adjustable vent ring allows for shorter or longer reset period

Set Wireless Rain-Clik Transmitter Address

Only needed if transmitter or receiver is replaced, or purchased separately.

  1. Step 1: Remove power from the controller.
    Press and hold the Bypass button on the receiver.
  2. Step 2: While holding the button, restore power.
    The sensor LED should turn amber, indicating the receiver is ready to pair.
  3. Step 3: Press and hold the Quick Response button on the transmitter for 5 seconds.
  4. Step 4: Within 4 seconds, the receiver LED should turn red, meaning the address was learned.
  5. Step 5: Release the transmitter button.
    The LED should turn green to confirm successful pairing.

Note: When power is restored, the LED may stay red while syncing (up to 1 hour).
To sync immediately, press and hold the "Test" button for 5 seconds, then release. The LED should turn green.

Name: Hunter WSS-TR Wireless Solar Sync ET/Rain/Freeze Weather Sensor Transmitter Only (WSSTR)
Short description:
This product serves as the replacement sensor for the Hunter WSS-SEN Wireless Solar Sync ET Sensor Kit.
Product Date code is 2024

  • Replacement Sensor Transmitter Only
  • Saves water and reduces water bills with smart weather-sensing technology.
  • Compatible with Hunter irrigation controllers for easy installation and use.
  • Adjusts watering schedules based on real-time weather conditions for optimal efficiency.
Description:
The Solar Sync ET sensor is an advanced weather sensor that calculates evapotranspiration (ET) and adjusts Hunter controllers daily based on local weather conditions. Solar Sync measures sunlight and temperature and uses ET to determine the correct seasonal adjustment percentage value to send to the controller.The controller then uses its programmed run time and adjusts to Solar Sync’s seasonal adjustment value to modify the actual irrigation run time for that day. In addition, the Solar Sync ET sensor integrates Hunter’s popular Rain-Clik™ and Freeze-Clik® sensors providing a quick response in shutting down your irrigation system during rain and/or freezing conditions. The Solar Sync is compatible with most Hunter controllers and applicable to residences, businesses, and municipalities alike.
Add a Solar Sync® Sensor to your Hunter controller to enable automatic smart control and maximize water savings. Solar Sync measures local weather conditions to help the controller fine-tune watering schedules according to exact site needs. Hunter controllers installed with Solar Sync are independently verified to offer an extensive list of water-saving features. Solar Sync is EPA WaterSense® approved.

Short description:
MP Rotator Nozzle, 0.4 in/hr precipitation rate, 8' to 15' radius, 45° to 105° adjustable arc, male thread, turquoise
  • Low precipitation rate of approximately 0.4 in/hr — lowest in the industry
  • Automatic matched precipitation for simplified irrigation design and flexibility
  • The double-pop feature protects the nozzle from external debris
  • High distribution uniformity for a healthy landscape with maximum water efficiency
  • Wind-resistant, multi-stream technology prevents misting
  • Adjustable arc only when MP Rotator is running for vandal resistance
Description:
With the lowest precipitation rate on the market and multi-stream technology, the Standard MP Rotator Nozzle is the most trusted high-efficiency nozzle solution, offering up to 30% water savings over traditional spray nozzles.
  • The lowest precipitation rate in the industry is approximately 0.4 in/hr
  • Matched precipitation for simplified irrigation design and flexibility
  • The double-pop feature protects the nozzle from external debris
  • High distribution uniformity for a healthy landscape with maximum water efficiency
The revolutionary MP Rotator Nozzle features a unique, multi-trajectory rotating stream delivery system that applies water slowly and steadily with maximum distribution uniformity. This increased efficiency reduces wasteful runoff and uses 30% less water when compared to traditional spray nozzles. With the lowest precipitation rate in the industry, the MP Rotator can be installed onto any conventional spray head body or shrub adapter to transform them into high-uniformity, low-precipitation-rate sprinklers. Offering immense range flexibility and improved system efficiency, MP Rotator Nozzles are the perfect choice for ensuring healthy landscapes and maximum water savings in both new and retrofit systems.

Name: Hunter ACC99D 99 Station 2-Wire Decoder Metal Controller (ACC-99D)
Short description:
• Number of stations: 1 to 99 with Hunter ICD Decoders
  • 6 automatic programs (10 start times each)
  • SSGs (Simultaneous Station Groups) to consolidate large systems
  • Built-in Solar Sync logic for smart water savings
  • Real-time flow monitoring detects and diagnoses leaks with an optional flow sensor
  • Detailed alarm logs in plain language
  • Programmable Rain Delay after sensor shutdown
  • Easy Retrieve programming backup and restore
  • Non-Water Windows to inhibit accidental irrigation
  • Cycle and Soak, Delay Between Stations
Description:
The Hunter ACC-99D is a powerful decoder-based irrigation controller designed to handle large-scale irrigation projects with maximum flexibility and reliability. Ideal for commercial landscapes, sports fields, and municipal projects, the ACC-99D provides advanced features and robust capabilities for precise water management.

Key Features:

  • Decoder Control System: Supports up to 99 stations using Hunter's ICD decoders for streamlined wiring and enhanced reliability.
  • Expandable Flexibility: Compatible with a range of sensor inputs, including flow meters, rain sensors, and soil moisture sensors, for intelligent irrigation.
  • Advanced Programming Options: Multiple programs (up to 6 independent programs) and start times per program to accommodate complex scheduling needs.
  • User-Friendly Interface: Large backlit LCD display with intuitive navigation simplifies programming and operation.
  • Flow Management: Built-in flow monitoring to detect leaks or blockages and automatically respond to prevent water waste.
  • Water Budgeting: Global and program-specific seasonal adjustments to optimize water usage throughout the year.
  • Remote Management: Compatible with Hunter Centralus™ software for remote control, monitoring, and reporting via internet connectivity.
  • Surge Protection: Enhanced electrical surge protection to safeguard against power fluctuations and lightning strikes.
  • Robust Construction: Weatherproof housing designed for durability in tough environments.

The Hunter ACC-99D ensures efficiency, durability, and flexibility for the most demanding irrigation needs. Simplify your large-scale watering operations and achieve unparalleled control with this professional-grade controller.

Name: Hunter Drip ECO-WRAP Dripline 250' 0.6 GPH 12 in. Spacing (ECOWRAP16)
Short description:
• Perfect for narrow areas that are difficult to irrigate with standard methods
  • Anti-siphon feature and fleece wrap protect against debris and root intrusion
  • Saves 20–40% more water than standard products due to superior capillary movement of water to the entire root zone, promoting healthier root growth
  • Non-draining, pressure-compensating emitters open/close simultaneously, maximizing efficiency
  • Check the height of 1.5 m to minimize system drainage and runoff
Description:
For high-performance tubing with irrigation systems, select the Hunter Eco-Wrap Landscape Drip line. This landscape drip line has check valves that prevent low-point drainage for more user convenience. It eliminates overspray and has pressure-compensating emitters, which are great to use on non-leveled terrains for added anti-blocking prevention. It is fleece-wrapped, which moistens in no longer than 3 minutes and conserves water that bare drip lines cannot. This landscape drip line delivers high water uniformity, which decreases the likelihood of plant damage that could occur as a result of over-watering. Operating Specifications
  • Operating range: 1.0 to 3.5 bar; 100 to 350 kPa
  • Minimum filtration: 120 mesh; 125 microns
  • Air relief is recommended for sloping conditions greater than 1.5 m
  • Recommended installation depth: turf (10–16 cm); other (10–30 cm)
  • Compatible with Eco-Mat
  • Warranty period: 5 years (plus 2 additional years for environmental stress cracking)
Product Specifications
  • Flow rate: 2.1 l/hr
  • Emitter spacing: 30 cm
  • Tubing dimensions: 0.660" x 0.560" (outside/inside diameter)

Name: Hunter ICC2 I2CF-800-PL 8 Station (Up to 38) Controller, with Flow, Plastic (I2CF800PL)
Short description:
This flexible control system can run any combination of conventional, EZDS two-wire, or Wireless Valve Link outputs with built-in flow monitoring and convenient, online control with Centralus Software.
  • 4 independent irrigation programs with 8 start times per program
  • Any 2 programs can operate simultaneously, providing more efficient watering
  • 2 sensor inputs are available: one dedicated flow sensor input and one dedicated weather sensor input for Hunter Clik or Solar Sync  Sensors
  • Built-in flow monitoring for smart water savings
  • Compatible with both EZ Decoder and Wireless Valve Link Systems
Description:
Just like its famous predecessor, the robust ICC2 is a value-packed, light-to-midsize commercial irrigation controller that delivers more than you expect. Designed to control larger projects up to 54 stations, it offers two sensor inputs and advanced water savings with built-in flow monitoring. The ICC2 Controller offers control for three different types of output connections, up to 54 stations plus a master valve. It can also host conventional, two-wire, and wireless outputs to stations in the field, all in the same installation. Any two of its four automatic programs can run simultaneously, providing flexible and efficient watering options. In addition, the ICC2 facepack and station output modules are backward compatible to original ICC Controllers with upgrade kits available for supporting legacy systems. Secure, cloud-based control and monitoring are available via mobile-friendly Centralus Irrigation Management Software. Choose among three connectivity methods for a variety of applications (Wi-Fi, Ethernet, and 4G LTE Cellular). To simplify system management, the ICC2 Controller comes prewired for remote control with Hunter ROAM and ROAM XL Remotes. Available in plastic outdoor wall mount, metal outdoor wall mount, stainless steel wall mount, or plastic pedestal configurations, this versatile controller also has built-in Solar Sync® Sensor and flow monitoring logic for automatic water savings.
  • 4 independent irrigation programs (8 start times each) allow for customized scheduling
  • 2 sensor inputs available for dedicated flow sensor (HFS or HC Flow) and weather sensor (Clik or Solar Sync) connections
  • Backward compatibility to original ICC Controllers allows for quick updates to older systems
  • Forward compatibility with HCC Controllers and Hydrawise Software using a convenient upgrade kit
  • 12-hour maximum station run times provide flexibility for low-flow zones
  • Any 2 programs can operate simultaneously, providing more efficient watering
  • 1 P/MV output for pump start relay and master valve activation
  • Compatible with EZ Decoder System two-wire and Wireless Valve Link outputs in the same installation

Name: Hunter 4A 25-PACK, 4' Radius, 0° to 360° Female Thread Pro Adjustable Nozzle (4A)
Short description:
• Accurate: Crisp edges and large water droplets ensure proper coverage
  • Versatile: Adjust to any angle from 0º to 360º
  • Easy: Colour-coded for quick identification and simple inventory
  • Recommended operating pressure: 30 PSI
  • Pair with Pro-Spray® PRS30 pop-up for pressure regulation to 30 PSI
Description: Hunter's Pro Adjustable Nozzles are a versatile and efficient irrigation solution designed to meet the needs of both residential and commercial landscapes. These nozzles feature an adjustable arc range of 0-360 degrees, allowing you to customize the spray pattern to fit any shape or size of your lawn or garden. With varying radius adjustments from 4 to 17 feet, you can precisely control the water coverage, ensuring even distribution and eliminating dry spots or overwatering. Built with Precision Spray Technology, these nozzles deliver a uniform spray pattern, while the DuraShield Seal prevents clogging from dirt and debris, reducing maintenance and extending the nozzle's lifespan. Compatible with Hunter Spray bodies, they are easy to install or retrofit into existing systems. The 25-pack is perfect for larger projects or professionals, offering excellent value and durability. Whether you're looking to conserve water, improve irrigation efficiency, or tackle complex landscapes, the Hunter Pro Adjustable Nozzles provide a reliable, customizable, and cost-effective solution.

Description: The Hunter Irrigation Short Radius Micro Spray Nozzles are the perfect solution for irrigating small or intricate spaces with precision and efficiency. Designed specifically for compact areas, these highly accurate nozzles deliver targeted water distribution, making them ideal for gardens, flower beds, or tight landscaping zones. When paired with Pro-Spray pop-ups, they create a robust micro-spray system that ensures reliable performance and even coverage. The short radius design minimizes over-spray and water waste, while their durable construction ensures long-lasting use in various weather conditions. Easy to install and maintain, these micro spray nozzles are a smart choice for anyone looking to optimize irrigation in smaller spaces without compromising on quality or efficiency. Upgrade your irrigation system with Hunter's Short Radius Micro Spray Nozzles for precise, water-saving performance in every corner of your landscape.\n\nFor controlled irrigation of small spaces, Hunter offers a complete line of short-radius micro spray nozzles. The ASABE/ICC 802-2014 standard defines a micro spray as an emission device with a flow rate of 30 GPH or less at the largest area of coverage available when operated at 30 PSI. As landscaped areas continue to shrink in size, short radius micro spray nozzles provide an accurate watering solution for 2', 4', and 6' spaces while supporting a robust micro spray system.

With easy installation and ultimate reliability, every plant, shrub, and tree can receive the exact amount of water needed with no excess runoff or waste.

Name: Hunter Pro-Spray PROS-12-PRS40-CV-R 40 PSI 12" Pop-Up Pressure Regulated Reclaimed Body Only with Check Valve (PROS12PRS40CVR)
Short description:
• The industry’s strongest spray body for years of reliable performance
  • Pressure-regulated to 40 PSI for the MP Rotator
  • Gray cap for easy field identification
  • Co-molded wiper seal made from chemical- and chlorine-resistant materials
  • Innovative seal design prevents cap-to-body leaks, even with a loose cap
  • Heavy-duty spring for consistent riser retraction
  • FloGuard Technology option eliminates water waste in the event of a missing nozzle
  • Interchangeable components for easier servicing, retrofits, and upgrades
  • Check valve option eliminates low-head drainage
Description: Hunter’s revolutionary MP Rotator Nozzles use multi-stream technology to deliver accurate streams of water with superior uniformity. When used in place of standard spray nozzles, it’s not uncommon to see system water use decrease by 30% or more. This technology and water savings are brought to life in the Pro-Spray PRS40. This efficient watering tool combines the rugged Pro-Spray body and replaces the traditional nozzle with an MP Rotator. Regulated at 40PSI, the Pro-Spray PRS40 ensures the optimum output pressure to achieve maximum efficiency. It is recommended for both residential and commercial applications and is available in an array of configurations to suit the needs of any site.

Regulated at 40PSI, the Pro-Spray PRS40 ensures the optimum output pressure to achieve maximum efficiency. It is recommended for both residential and commercial applications and is available in an array of configurations to suit the needs of any site.

Name: Hunter ST-243636-B 24x36" Polymer-Concrete Enclosure Vault for ST-1600 Rotors (ST243636B)
Short description:
• Synthetic turf accessory, composite vault, precast hole for rotor and quick-access ports for Quick Coupler and remote on-off-auto selector; for use with ST-1600-KIT
  • ST Vault for ST1600 Rotors - STK-5V & STK-6V - 4-Piece Cover - 24" X 36" X 36"
Description:
Housing Hunter's ST Rotors with a Vault helps to ensure the rotor and its components are protected while providing easy access to the to the rotor, quick coupler valve, and remote manifold assembly. The vault is manufactured from heavy-duty, construction grade fiberglass in the body, a high-impact resistant composite plastic on the exposed upper rim, and a nearly indestructible polymer-concrete cover set. The result is a 20,000+ lb. rated enclosure that is durable yet easy to install.

The thick three-piece cover has a conveniently located cast-in hole for an STG-900 rotor on one side, allowing the rotor to be held perfectly to grade within the hole while the enclosure is back-filled from the exposed opposite side. A quick-coupler access port provides a handy source of water for washing down spills and water-soluble paint. The advanced design of the ST enclosure makes servicing easier and the system less expensive to maintain.

Name: Hunter I-Core IC600SS 6 Station (Up to 42) Outdoor Stainless Steel Controller (IC-600-SS)
Short description:
• 6-Station Controller
  • Indoor & Outdoor Use
  • Stainless Steel Cabinet
  • Expands up to 42 Stations with ICM-600s
Description:
The I-Core is Hunter’s controller for demanding commercial and high-end residential applications. Loaded with innovative features like state-of-the-art flow monitoring, quick system overview access, a factory-installed SmartPort®, six language capability, and a bold, backlit display, the I-Core should be considered for most high-end irrigation projects.

A big reason the I-Core is so unique is its sheer versatility. The plastic cabinet version is expandable from 6 to 30 stations, and the metal cabinet model can handle up to 42. Adding a DUAL® two-wire module can even expand station capability to 48. Stainless steel and pedestal models are also available, providing a broad range of enclosure choices. With other add-on options like a ROAM or ROAM XL remote and the built-in conservation-focused Solar-Sync®, I-Core’s possibilities are all but limitless.

  • Number of Stations:
    • Conventional: 6 to 42 (stainless and pedestals)
    • With DUAL® decoder: Up to 48
  • Irrigation Programs:
    • 4 independent programs (8 start times each) for customized scheduling
    • 12-hour maximum station run time for flexibility in lower-flow zones
    • Any 2 programs can operate simultaneously for more efficient watering
  • Sensor Inputs:
    • 3 (metal and pedestals)
  • Outputs:
    • 1 P/MV output for pump start relay and master valve activation
  • Additional Features:
    • Flow-monitoring capabilities provide real-time water usage data
    • Programmable No Water Window prevents irrigation during specified times
    • High-visibility, backlit display with 6 selectable languages

ADVANCED FEATURES

WATERSENSE® SMART WATERING CONTROLLER BY ADDING SOLAR SYNC

Add a Solar Sync® Sensor to your Hunter controller to enable automatic smart control and maximize water savings. Solar Sync measures local weather conditions to help the controller fine-tune watering schedules according to exact site needs. Hunter controllers installed with Solar Sync are independently verified to offer an extensive list of water-saving features. Solar Sync is EPA WaterSense® approved. Click here to learn more about Smart Controllers

REAL-TIME FLOW MONITORING

This feature permits the connection of a flow meter to recognize high or low flow conditions and react automatically to alarms. The controller learns typical flows for each zone of irrigation and then monitors performance during automatic irrigation. When incorrect flows are detected, the controller can identify the faulty station and shut it down. Alarm parameters are user-programmable. Flow totals are recorded in controller memory to report system water usage.

EASY RETRIEVE™ MEMORY

A manual backup utility that stores complete controller scheduling and setup information in backup memory.

ONE-TOUCH MANUAL START AND ADVANCE

Allows any program to be started manually by simply pressing and holding the right arrow key.

PROGRAMMABLE RAIN DELAY

The Programmable Rain Delay feature enables a user-specified number of days to keep the controller in the OFF mode, following a local rain storm. This will prevent watering during inclement weather and reverts to automatic scheduled irrigation once the delay period elapses.

QUICK CHECK™

The QuickCheck feature makes field wiring issues easy to assess with the push of a button. QuickCheck displays an ERR message when a field wiring short is detected on a particular station number.

NON-VOLATILE MEMORY

This feature offers protection against unreliable power, retaining current time, date, and program data.

AUTOMATIC SHORT CIRCUIT PROTECTION

Automatic short circuit protection is a feature found in all Hunter AC-powered controllers. This feature automatically detects electrical faults, which are typically caused by wiring issues. Only affected stations are skipped, allowing all other stations to water normally as programmed.

SEASONAL ADJUSTMENT: GLOBAL, MONTHLY, AND SOLAR SYNC FOR I-CORE

This feature allows for quick adjustments to irrigation run times through a percentage scale. During peak season, set the seasonal adjustment to 100%. If weather conditions require less water, enter the appropriate percentage value (i.e. 50%) to cut down irrigation run times without the need to adjust each station in the program. The I-Core offers three different ways to use Seasonal Adjustments to reduce water usage:

Global: Provides a seasonal adjustment value to all selected programs.

Monthly: Allows users to program a seasonal adjustment value for each month of the year. This is exclusively available on the I-Core and works by automatically changing the programmed seasonal adjustment value on the first day of every month.

Solar Sync: When connected to the I-Core, the Solar Sync ET sensor implements an automatic daily adjustment based on measured local weather.

DELAY BETWEEN STATIONS FOR I-CORE AND ACC

Users can program a delay between stations as the controller advances from one station to the next. This delay can range from a few seconds (to permit slow-closing valves additional time to close) to a much longer period of time (to allow pressure tanks time to recharge), based on user requirements. In ACC and I-Core, Delay Between Stations may be set by individual programs.

SENSOR PROGRAMMABILITY FOR I-CORE

The Sensor Programmability feature allows the user to specify which stations should shut down in response to a sensor alarm, allowing specified stations or programs to run uninterrupted in the event of a sensor alarm.

CYCLE AND SOAK

This water-saving feature allows the operator to specify a maximum cycle time for each station, followed by a minimum soak time, to prevent runoff from slopes or saturated soil. The operator can enter any run time, and the controller will automatically divide it into cycles to allow the water to be absorbed during the soak periods. The feature is adjustable for each individual station or Block of stations for unique soil and site conditions.

NO WATER WINDOW

User-specified periods of time during which the controller will not allow automatic irrigation. No Water Window can be used to comply with local watering restrictions or to prevent conflicts with pedestrian traffic. This setting does not affect manual watering options for local maintenance.

NON-WATER DAYS

Day(s) of the week can be programmed OFF in advance so that irrigation does not occur regardless of program interval schedules. For example, if the gardener mows the lawn on Saturday, the Non-Water Days feature allows Saturday to be programmed OFF so that watering will not occur.

SOLAR SYNC™ DELAY

Solar Sync Delay allows the installer to specify the number of days before automatic weather adjustment begins. This allows a period of non-adjusted irrigation for grow-in or plant establishment purposes, without requiring a return visit to the site to enable the Solar Sync water-saving feature.

MULTI-LANGUAGE PROGRAMMING

I-Core can be programmed in English, Spanish, French, Italian, German, and Portuguese.

TOTAL RUN TIME CALCULATOR

This calculates the total duration of a program, based on all of its station run times. This can be used to calculate the end time of a program.

Name: Hunter X-Core Irrigation Controller
Short description:
Looking for the Wi-Fi version? Check out the Hunter X2 and WAND module

The Hunter X-Core is an entry-level residential irrigation controller that combines user-friendly operation with professional-grade features. Perfect for homeowners and contractors seeking reliable, efficient lawn irrigation management.
  • Compatible with Solar Sync for smart weather-based watering
  • 3 programs with 4 start times each for flexible scheduling
  • Easy-to-configure interface with simple programming
  • Automatic short circuit protection skips affected stations
  • Programmable rain delay prevents watering during wet weather
  • Seasonal adjustment for quick schedule modifications
  • Easy Retrieve memory backup protects your settings
  • Compatible with Hunter remotes for wireless operation
Description:
Professional Irrigation Control Made Simple

The Hunter X-Core irrigation controller delivers the perfect balance of simplicity and advanced features for both residential users and irrigation professionals. This versatile controller offers easy programming while providing the water management capabilities needed for today's conservation-conscious environment.

Available in indoor and outdoor models with 2 (indoor only), 4, 6, or 8 station capacity, the X-Core accommodates most residential irrigation needs. Its user-friendly interface makes programming intuitive - simply set your watering schedule, run times, and start times using the dial and button controls.

Smart Water Conservation

Transform your basic irrigation system into a water-saving smart controller by adding the optional Solar Sync sensor. This revolutionary accessory automatically adjusts your irrigation schedule based on local weather conditions, preventing overwatering during cool or rainy periods while ensuring adequate irrigation during hot, dry spells.

The X-Core includes essential water management features:

  • Programmable rain delay allows you to specify days to skip watering following precipitation
