Name: Hunter HPC-400 7 Zone Outdoor Wi-Fi Controller (HPC400 + PCM300)
Short description:
Backed by the latest cloud technology, the Hydrawise HPC-400 outdoor irrigation controller from Hunter Industries waters your landscape only when it’s needed — and never when it’s not! The modular base model is expandable up to 23 conventional stations or 32 conventional + two-wire stations. Perfect for residential and light commercial irrigation systems in any environment, the HPC provides ultimate water savings and remote irrigation management capabilities from your smartphone, tablet, or the web. It also sends instant alerts for needed maintenance. Experience the difference of Hydrawise smart watering today!
  • 7-Station Model
  • Save up to 50% on your water bill!
  • Automatically adjusts irrigation schedules based on local weather data to provide maximum water savings and healthy, beautiful landscapes
  • Manage irrigation from your smartphone, tablet, or the web
  • Full programming at the controller interface or via the Hydrawise app
  • Ideal for residential and light commercial applications
  • Power source type: Electric
Description:
The HPC combines the power of Wi-Fi-based irrigation management and the convenience of modular functionality into one next-generation controller. HPC helps contractors save time, save water, protect landscapes, and meet the demands of customers who want smart home solutions. In addition, it lets contractors continue using their Roam and Roam XL remotes for quick on-site management.

Among the controller's many robust features is Predictive Watering™, which adjusts irrigation schedules based on local, real-time temperature, rainfall probability, wind, and humidity. A built-in milliamp sensor makes troubleshooting wiring issues easy. By adding a simple-to-install HC Flow Meter, users can receive notifications regarding leaking pipes or broken sprinklers. Users can also manage the controller from anywhere using a smartphone, tablet, or computer.

The HPC is EPA WaterSense approved. Hydrawise is also compatible with Amazon Alexa for convenient voice control to start, stop, and suspend irrigation.

  • Number of stations:
    • Conventional wiring from 4 to 23 stations
  • Hybrid EZ Decoder option up to 32 total stations (28 stations maximum if two-wire only)
  • Standard programming option allows for 6 independent irrigation programs and 6 start times per program
  • 2 sensor inputs available for use with any Clik sensor or HC Flow Meter
  • 1 P/MV output for pump start relay and master valve activation
  • Wi-Fi enabled for quick connection to Hydrawise Software
  • 2¾" full-color touchscreen display for Wi-Fi setup, zone testing, and offline programming at the control panel
  • Built-in milliamp sensor for wire fault detection and alerts

HYDRAWISE EPA WATERSENSE APPROVED SMART WATERING

All Hydrawise® enabled controllers are EPA WaterSense® approved. The web-based Hydrawise Platform includes Predictive Watering® Technology that allows the controllers to maximize water savings by adjusting irrigation schedules according to forecast temperature, rainfall probability, wind speed, and humidity.

TOUCH-SCREEN INTERFACE (HPC)

The HPC controller has a full graphical touchscreen interface, which makes programming with or without Wi-Fi connectivity and manual starting from the controller a breeze.

PREDICTIVE WATERING™ ADJUSTMENTS

Daily schedule adjustments based on local weather data monitor past, current, and forecasted temperature, rainfall, humidity, and wind speed. This allows for adjustments of watering times and schedules to balance water savings with water efficiency for plants.

FLOW METER DETECTION AND ALERTS

Monitor your piping and sprinklers with an optional HC Flow Meter. Receive automatic alerts when a pipe is broken to prevent property damage.

WIRING DETECTION AND ALERTS (HPC)

HPC controllers continuously monitor the electrical current flowing to your solenoid valves. If the current is too high or too low, Hydrawise will alert you and tell you which valve is not working properly. This allows you to correct a failed valve before damage is done to plant materials.

*Latest model with Two Sensor Inputs - Backed by the latest cloud technology, the Hydrawise HPC-400 outdoor irrigation controller from Hunter Industries waters your landscape only when it’s needed — and never when it’s not! The modular base model is expandable up to 16 stations. Perfect for residential and light commercial irrigation systems in any environment, the HPC provides ultimate water savings and remote irrigation management capabilities from your smartphone, tablet, or the web. It also sends instant alerts for needed maintenance. Experience the difference of Hydrawise smart watering today!
  • Save up to 50% on your water bill!
  • Automatically adjusts irrigation schedules based on local weather data to provide maximum water savings and healthy, beautiful landscapes
  • Manage irrigation from your smartphone, tablet, or the web
  • Full programming at the controller interface or via the Hydrawise app
  • The 4-station base model is expandable up to 16 stations, with one sensor port to enable additional water savings
  • Ideal for residential and light commercial applications
  • Power source type: Electric
Description:
The HPC combines the power of Wi-Fi-based irrigation management and the convenience of modular functionality into one next-generation controller. HPC helps contractors save time, save water, protect landscapes, and meet the demands of customers who want smart home solutions. In addition, it lets contractors continue using their Roam and Roam XL remotes for quick on-site management.

Among the controller's many robust features is Predictive Watering™, which adjusts irrigation schedules based on local, real-time temperature, rainfall probability, wind, and humidity. A built-in milliamp sensor makes troubleshooting wiring issues easy. By adding a simple-to-install HC Flow Meter, users can receive notifications regarding leaking pipes or broken sprinklers. Users can also manage the controller from anywhere using a smartphone, tablet, or computer.

The HPC is EPA WaterSense approved. Hydrawise is also compatible with Amazon Alexa for convenient voice control to start, stop, and suspend irrigation.

  • Number of stations:
    • Conventional wiring from 4 to 23 stations
  • Hybrid EZ Decoder option up to 32 total stations (28 stations maximum if two-wire only)
  • Standard programming option allows for 6 independent irrigation programs and 6 start times per program
  • 2 sensor inputs available for use with any Clik sensor or HC Flow Meter
  • 1 P/MV output for pump start relay and master valve activation
  • Wi-Fi enabled for quick connection to Hydrawise Software
  • 2¾" full-color touchscreen display for Wi-Fi setup, zone testing, and offline programming at the control panel
  • Built-in milliamp sensor for wire fault detection and alerts

HYDRAWISE EPA WATERSENSE APPROVED SMART WATERING

All Hydrawise® enabled controllers are EPA WaterSense® approved. The web-based Hydrawise Platform includes Predictive Watering® Technology that allows the controllers to maximize water savings by adjusting irrigation schedules according to forecast temperature, rainfall probability, wind speed, and humidity.

TOUCH-SCREEN INTERFACE (HPC)

The HPC controller has a full graphical touchscreen interface, which makes programming with or without Wi-Fi connectivity and manual starting from the controller a breeze.

PREDICTIVE WATERING™ ADJUSTMENTS

Daily schedule adjustments based on local weather data monitor past, current, and forecasted temperature, rainfall, humidity, and wind speed. This allows for adjustments of watering times and schedules to balance water savings with water efficiency for plants.

FLOW METER DETECTION AND ALERTS

Monitor your piping and sprinklers with an optional HC Flow Meter. Receive automatic alerts when a pipe is broken to prevent property damage.

WIRING DETECTION AND ALERTS (HPC)

HPC controllers continuously monitor the electrical current flowing to your solenoid valves. If the current is too high or too low, Hydrawise will alert you and tell you which valve is not working properly. This allows you to correct a failed valve before damage is done to plant materials.

Name: Hunter Pro-C P2C-400 Wi-Fi Facepack Retrofit Upgrade Kit for PC400 and PC400i (P2CFPUP)
Short description:
• Replacement Facepack (10032800SP) with integrated Wi-Fi module for Hunter Pro-C 400 irrigation systems
  • Cost-effective upgrade solution compared to full controller replacement
  • Manage irrigation remotely via Centralus software from any smartphone, tablet, or computer
  • Compatible with existing PC400 and PC400i controller cabinets
  • Supports multiple programs, start times, and customized zone configurations
  • Easy installation with no special tools required
Description:
The Hunter Pro-C P2C-400 Wi-Fi Facepack Retrofit Upgrade Kit (P2CFPUP) provides an essential control panel upgrade that brings modern connectivity to your existing Hunter Pro-C 400 irrigation system. This genuine OEM replacement panel seamlessly integrates with your current controller cabinet, offering a cost-effective solution compared to replacing the entire unit.

Featuring Hunter's intuitive programming interface with a clear LCD display and easy-to-navigate buttons, this upgrade kit maintains all the advanced features of your original controller while adding the convenience of Wi-Fi connectivity. Installation is straightforward—simply remove your existing facepack and connect this replacement for immediate restoration and enhancement of your irrigation control system.

With the integrated Wi-Fi module, you can manage your irrigation system from anywhere using the Centralus™ Irrigation Management Software on any computer, tablet, or smartphone. Create and edit programs either directly through the facepack dial or remotely through the Centralus website. The system supports multiple programs, start times, and zone configurations, allowing for customized watering schedules to meet your landscape's specific needs.

Additional features include seasonal adjustment capabilities, rain sensor bypass options, and programmable rain delay functions. The durable construction and reliable electronics ensure continued service for residential and light commercial irrigation applications when properly installed in your existing controller housing.

Choose the Hunter Pro-C P2C-400 Wi-Fi Facepack Retrofit Upgrade Kit for a seamless upgrade that extends the lifespan of your irrigation controller while adding the convenience of remote access and precise watering control your landscape demands.

Name: Hunter Pro-C P2C-400 Outdoor Wi-Fi Modular 4 Zone Controller (P2C-400-WIFI)
Short description:
Simple programming and flexible station expansion make the Pro-C Controller the professional's choice for residential and light commercial systems.

  • Includes Remote operation: PC-WIFI Module enables convenient management from anywhere via Centralus Software.
  • Flexible design: Modular station expansion allows for conventional wiring from 4 to 23 stations.
  • Two-wire compatible: Enable hybrid two-wire control for up to 32 stations with EZ-1 Decoders.
  • Enhanced sensor functionality: Two sensor inputs are available for use with Hunter Solar Sync and Clik Sensors.
Description:
The Pro-C P2C-400 Controller has been the professional’s choice in residential and light commercial landscape projects for decades. This reliable controller provides simple, affordable irrigation management with convenient expansion options in a compact package. Pro-C P2C-400 users can choose from conventional wiring, innovative EZ Decoder control, or hybrid conventional/two-wire operations. This provides the ultimate flexibility when designing or installing a new project, retrofitting an outdated system, or expanding a landscape.

KEY BENEFITS

  • Number of stations:
    • Modular Pro-C P2C-400 (P2C400)
      ◦ Conventional wiring from 4 to 23 stations
      ◦ Hybrid EZ Decoder option up to 32 total stations
      (28 stations maximum if two-wire only)
  • 3 automatic irrigation programs with 4 start times per program and 6-hour run
    times per station
  • 2 sensor inputs available for use with Solar Sync or any Clik Sensors
  • 1 P/MV output for pump start relay and master valve activation
  • High-visibility, backlit display for simple programming in any light
  • Optional Seconds Mode allows for station run times with seconds resolution
    from 1 second to 5 minutes
  • Easy Retrieve® Memory allows for manual backup and retrieval of preferred
    settings and programming
  • QuickCheck™ Technology provides simple diagnostics of faulty field wiring
  • Backward compatible with previous modular PC-400 models dated 2014 - 2023

OPERATING SPECIFICATIONS

  • Transformer input: 120 VAC
  • Transformer output (24 VAC): 1 A
  • Station output (24 VAC): 0.56 A
  • P/MV output (24 VAC): 0.28 A
  • Approvals: IP44 (outdoor), UL, cUL, FCC, CE, UKCA, RCM, ISED
  • Warranty period: 2 years

USER-INSTALLED OPTIONS

  • Compatible with Hunter Flow-Clik™ Sensor for catastrophic high-flow detection
    and automatic system shutdown

ADVANCED FEATURES

WATERSENSE® SMART WATERING CONTROLLER BY ADDING SOLAR SYNC

Add a Solar Sync® Sensor to your Hunter controller to enable automatic smart control and maximize water savings. Solar Sync measures local weather conditions to help the controller fine-tune watering schedules according to exact site needs. Hunter controllers installed with Solar Sync are independently verified to offer an extensive list of water-saving features. Solar Sync is EPA WaterSense® approved. Click here to learn more about Smart Controllers

EASY RETRIEVE™ MEMORY

A manual backup utility that stores complete controller scheduling and setup information in backup memory.

AUTOMATIC SHORT CIRCUIT PROTECTION

Automatic short circuit protection is a feature found in all Hunter AC-powered controllers. This feature automatically detects electrical faults, which are typically caused by wiring issues. Only affected stations are skipped, allowing all other stations to water normally as programmed.

QUICK CHECK™

The QuickCheck feature makes field wiring issues easy to assess with the push of a button. QuickCheck displays an ERR message when a field wiring short is detected on a particular station number.

SEASONAL ADJUSTMENT: GLOBAL OR AUTOMATIC UPDATES WITH SOLAR SYNC

This feature allows for quick adjustment to irrigation run times based on seasonal weather conditions.

Global: The Global option provides a Seasonal Adjustment percentage to all station Run Times on all of the controller's Programs.

Daily: With the addition of a Solar Sync ET Sensor, the controller has the ability to automatically implement daily adjustments based on measured local weather.

DELAY BETWEEN STATIONS

Users can program a delay between stations as the controller advances from one station to the next. This delay can range from a few seconds (to permit slow-closing valves additional time to close) to a much longer period of time (to allow pressure tanks time to recharge), based on user requirements.

SENSOR PROGRAMMABILITY

The ability to specify which program will be shut down in response to a specific sensor alarm. This allows programs unaffected by the sensor to continue automatic operations.

NON-WATER DAYS

Day(s) of the week can be programmed OFF in advance so that irrigation does not occur regardless of program interval schedules. For example, if the gardener mows the lawn on Saturday, the Non-Water Days feature allows Saturday to be programmed OFF so that watering will not occur.

Name: Hunter 17A-HE 25-PACK, 17' Radius, 0° to 360° Female Thread Pro Adjustable High-Efficiency Nozzle (17AHE)
Short description:
• High efficiency performance from a high-uniformity spray pattern
  • Matched precipitation of 40 mm/hr from 2.4 m to 5.2 m across the 0° to 360° adjustable arc range
  • Color-coded with natural hues that blend seamlessly with the landscape and provide easy field identification
  • Radius 2.4 m – 5.2 m
  • Precipitation Rate Approximately 40 mm/hr
Description:
Hunter Pro High-Efficiency Nozzles represent a significant advancement in irrigation technology, offering superior performance compared to standard adjustable nozzles. These nozzles feature lower flows for the 2.4m and 3.0m models while maintaining matched precipitation rates from 2.4m to 5.2m across the full 0° to 360° adjustable arc range. Designed with precision in mind, they combine high-uniformity spray patterns with matched precipitation rates to improve irrigation efficiency and significantly reduce water waste.

Installation is simplified with clear left-edge indicators at the top and right-edge indicators at the base, ensuring proper positioning of spray patterns. The nozzles feature thick, easy-grip tops that are adjustable from 0° to 360° and provide excellent protection against equipment damage, resulting in reliable, long-lasting performance even in demanding conditions.

Pro High-Efficiency Nozzles are color-coded with natural hues that blend seamlessly into landscapes while still allowing for easy field identification. Their smooth spray pattern with well-defined edges enables targeted landscape irrigation, making them the ideal choice for professional irrigation systems where water conservation and uniform coverage are priorities.

These nozzles pair perfectly with Hunter Pro-Spray PRS30 Pop-Up Sprinkler Bodies to create complete irrigation systems that deliver optimal performance and water efficiency for residential and commercial applications.

Name: FX Luminaire TS Down Light, No Lamp Flat White (TS-NL-FW)
Short description:
• Adjustable outdoor track light functionality with complete lighting control
  • Machined from aerospace-grade aluminum with industrial polyester powder-coat finish
  • Mounting base swivels and pivots on nylon bushings for precise aiming
  • Deep cowling for superior glare control to avoid typical downlight hot spots
Description:
The FX Luminaire TS TrellisSolare represents a breakthrough in outdoor down lighting technology, functioning like an adjustable track light that provides complete control over outdoor illumination. Crafted from high-performance aerospace-grade aluminum alloy with a durable industrial polyester powder-coat finish, this fixture is engineered to withstand harsh outdoor conditions while maintaining its aesthetic appeal.

What sets the TS apart is its exceptional versatility and performance. The innovative mounting base smoothly swivels and pivots on nylon bushings, allowing for precise aiming adjustments even after installation. Its deep cowling provides superior glare control, effectively eliminating the hot spots commonly found in standard downlights, resulting in more comfortable and visually appealing illumination.

The TS TrellisSolare is ideal for creating moonlighting effects from trees or architectural elements. Its compact size coupled with high-intensity output makes it particularly effective for illuminating small trees and medium-sized patio spaces, while larger models can handle more substantial lighting needs. The fixture uses the same lamp as other FX Luminaire fixtures (CL, TC, and VL), enabling designers to mix different fixture types while maintaining consistent light quality throughout a project.

As part of FX Luminaire's standard series, the TS upholds the brand's commitment to quality, with fixtures backed by a three-year warranty that extends to ten years when used exclusively with FX Luminaire transformers or controllers.

Name: Hunter ICC2 38 Station Controller with Flow, Plastic Enclosure (I2CF3800PL)
Short description:
This flexible control system can run any combination of conventional, EZDS two-wire, or Wireless Valve Link outputs with built-in flow monitoring and convenient, online control with Centralus Software.
  • 4 independent irrigation programs with 8 start times per program
  • Any 2 programs can operate simultaneously, providing more efficient watering
  • 2 sensor inputs are available: one dedicated flow sensor input and one dedicated weather sensor input for Hunter Clik or Solar Sync  Sensors
  • Built-in flow monitoring for smart water savings
  • Compatible with both EZ Decoder and Wireless Valve Link Systems
Description:
Just like its famous predecessor, the robust ICC2 is a value-packed, light-to-midsize commercial irrigation controller that delivers more than you expect. Designed to control larger projects, it offers two sensor inputs and advanced water savings with built-in flow monitoring. The ICC2 Controller offers control for three different types of output connections. It can also host conventional, two-wire, and wireless outputs to stations in the field, all in the same installation. Any two of its four automatic programs can run simultaneously, providing flexible and efficient watering options. In addition, the ICC2 facepack and station output modules are backward compatible to original ICC Controllers with upgrade kits available for supporting legacy systems. Secure, cloud-based control and monitoring are available via mobile-friendly Centralus Irrigation Management Software. Choose among three connectivity methods for a variety of applications (Wi-Fi, Ethernet, and 4G LTE Cellular). To simplify system management, the ICC2 Controller comes prewired for remote control with Hunter ROAM and ROAM XL Remotes. Available in plastic outdoor wall mount, metal outdoor wall mount, stainless steel wall mount, or plastic pedestal configurations, this versatile controller also has built-in Solar Sync® Sensor and flow monitoring logic for automatic water savings.
  • 4 independent irrigation programs (8 start times each) allow for customized scheduling
  • 2 sensor inputs available for dedicated flow sensor (HFS or HC Flow) and weather sensor (Clik or Solar Sync) connections
  • Backward compatibility to original ICC Controllers allows for quick updates to older systems
  • Forward compatibility with HCC Controllers and Hydrawise Software using a convenient upgrade kit
  • 12-hour maximum station run times provide flexibility for low-flow zones
  • Any 2 programs can operate simultaneously, providing more efficient watering
  • 1 P/MV output for pump start relay and master valve activation
  • Compatible with EZ Decoder System two-wire and Wireless Valve Link outputs in the same installation

Name: Hunter Hydrawise HCC 54 Station Wi-Fi Controller, Metal Enclosure (HCC5400M)
Short description:
Bring the power of Hydrawise to residential, commercial, and public-sector projects with this affordable powerhouse.
  • Wi-Fi capable: Fully integrated for quick connection to Hydrawise cloud-based irrigation management system
  • Two-wire decoder option: Up to 54 EZ decoder stations or combine with conventional output modules
  • Compatible with both EZ Decoders and the Wireless Valve Link system
Description:
The next-generation Hydrawise HCC controller brings the powerful Wi-Fi-based irrigation management capabilities of the industry-leading Hydrawise™ platform to high-end residential, commercial, and public-sector projects. The HCC provides a range of convenient features to monitor larger projects — all with the simple click of a button. The modular Hydrawise HCC Controller provides a range of convenient features to monitor larger projects — all with the simple click of a button. A full graphical touchscreen interface allows for programming and manual operation at the controller, with or without Wi-Fi connectivity. For maximum irrigation design flexibility, the controller also offers two-wire compatibility with the Hunter EZ Decoder System (EZDS). The Hydrawise HCC combines the robust features of the popular Hunter ICC2 controller with automatic, weather-based daily adjustments of Hydrawise programming to create a smart and economical solution for commercial landscape management. Hydrawise HCC can control up to 54 stations* and effectively operate any two stations simultaneously. The controller’s convenient modular design allows for rapid expandability with the same 4-, 8-, and 22-station output modules as the Hunter ICC2. Engineered with a prewired SmartPort®, Hydrawise HCC is also compatible with Hunter’s ROAM and ROAM XL remotes, allowing for fast and reliable manual operation in the field from long-range distances without the need for a smartphone. With a built-in milliamp sensor, troubleshooting faulty wires is a breeze. Easily install an HC Flow Meter to accurately monitor flow, prevent wasted water, and avoid damaged landscapes. KEY BENEFITS
  • HCC Controller Station Options:
    • Conventional: 8 to 38 (plastic), 8 to 54 (metal and pedestal)*
    • With two-wire EZDS: up to 54 (all enclosure options)
  • The standard programming option allows for 6 independent irrigation programs and 6 start times per program
  • The advanced programming option provides station-based programming with up to 6 total start times available
  • Any 2 programs or stations can operate simultaneously, providing more efficient watering
  • 2 sensor inputs available for use with any Clik sensors and HC Flow Meter
  • 1 P/MV output for pump start relay and master valve activation
  • Wi-Fi enabled for quick connection to Hydrawise software
  • 31/4" full-color touchscreen display for simple programming at the control panel
  • Built-in milliamp sensor for wire fault detection and alerts

OPERATING SPECIFICATIONS

  • Transformer input: 120/230 VAC
  • Transformer output (24 VAC): 1.4 A
  • Station output (24 VAC): 0.56 A
  • P/MV output (24 VAC): 0.56 A
  • 2.4 GHz (only) Wi-Fi router compatible, 802.11 b/g/n 20 MHz
  • Supported security protocols: WPA/WPA2 Personal (only), TLS, SSL
  • Approvals: Plastic Wall Mount IP55 (outdoor), Plastic Pedestal IP24 (outdoor), UL, cUL, FCC, CE, RCM
  • Warranty period: 5 years

TOUCHSCREEN INTERFACE (HCC)

The HCC controller has a full graphical touchscreen interface, which makes programming with or without Wi-Fi connectivity and manual starting from the controller a breeze.

PREDICTIVE WATERING™ ADJUSTMENTS

Hydrawise HCC daily schedules adjustments based on local weather data monitor past, current, and forecasted temperature, rainfall, humidity, and wind speed. This allows for adjustments of watering times and schedules to balance water savings with water efficiency for plants.

FLOW METER DETECTION AND ALERTS (HCC)

Monitor your piping and sprinklers with an optional HC Flow Meter. Receive automatic alerts when a pipe is broken to prevent property damage.

WIRING DETECTION AND ALERTS (HCC)

HCC controllers continuously monitor the electrical current flowing to your solenoid valves. If the current is too high or too low, Hydrawise will alert you and tell you which valve is not working properly. This allows you to correct a failed valve before damage is done to plant materials.

ADVANCED SENSOR PORTS (HCC)

Two general-purpose sensor ports can be used for many different functions. Sensor port works with the Hunter HC flow meters, the Hunter Clik sensor range, and standard rain and soil sensors to stop irrigation. The sensor ports can also start an irrigation cycle. This allows you to create custom starts based on sensor readings.

HYDRAWISE HCC EPA WATERSENSE-APPROVED SMART WATERING

All Hydrawise® enabled controllers are EPA WaterSense® approved. The web-based Hydrawise Platform includes Predictive Watering® Technology that allows the controllers to maximize water savings by adjusting irrigation schedules according to forecast temperature, rainfall probability, wind speed, and humidity. Manage Landscape Irrigation from Anywhere with the Wi-Fi Enabled HCC Controller and Hydrawise Platform Achieve maximum efficiency when you combine Hydrawise cloud-based software with Hydrawise HCC irrigation controllers. The powerful Hydrawise platform equips you with the tools you need to successfully manage residential applications. Predictive Watering technology adjusts schedules based on temperature forecast, rainfall probability, wind speed, and humidity to maximize water savings while keeping landscapes healthy and beautiful. Hydrawise monitors field wiring to call attention to maintenance needs before costly landscape damage occurs. For the highest level of protection, add a simple-to-install HC Flow Meter to alert you of broken pipes or sprinklers.

Name: Hunter WSS-R Wireless Solar Sync Receiver Only (WSSR)
Short description:
This product serves as the replacement receiver for the Hunter WSS-SEN Wireless Solar Sync ET Sensor Kit.

  • Replacement Receiver Only
  • Compatible with Hunter irrigation controllers for easy installation and use.
Description:
The Solar Sync ET sensor is an advanced weather sensor that calculates evapotranspiration (ET) and adjusts Hunter controllers daily based on local weather conditions. Solar Sync measures sunlight and temperature and uses ET to determine the correct seasonal adjustment percentage value to send to the controller.The controller then uses its programmed run time and adjusts to Solar Sync’s seasonal adjustment value to modify the actual irrigation run time for that day. In addition, the Solar Sync ET sensor integrates Hunter’s popular Rain-Clik™ and Freeze-Clik® sensors providing a quick response in shutting down your irrigation system during rain and/or freezing conditions. The Solar Sync is compatible with most Hunter controllers and applicable to residences, businesses, and municipalities alike.

Add a Solar Sync® Sensor to your Hunter controller to enable automatic smart control and maximize water savings. Solar Sync measures local weather conditions to help the controller fine-tune watering schedules according to exact site needs. Hunter controllers installed with Solar Sync are independently verified to offer an extensive list of water-saving features. Solar Sync is EPA WaterSense® approved.

Name: Hunter LAN-KIT Ethernet Communication Module for ICC2 Centralus Controllers (LANKIT)
Short description:
• Browser-based programming and communication software
  • Highly secure cloud access
  • Map-based navigation and status
  • Instant remote control from mobile device
  • Flow monitoring and reporting
  • Alarm reporting and detailed irrigation history reports
  • Responsive web design configures for your device, allowing the same controls from your smartphone, tablet, or desktop
  • Built-in Solar Sync logic/Solar Sync Delay features for smart water savings
  • Professional crew member administration with multiple levels of access
  • Organize maintenance teams and their controllers into management groups
Description:
The mobile-friendly Centralus irrigation management platform provides highly secure, comprehensive cloud-based control and monitoring features to new or existing ICC2 dial-based controllers. The connectivity allows you to view a controller’s status, change settings, view forecasts, save water, and receive instant notification of important system alarms — all without costly and time-consuming travel and site visits.

The addition of internet access brings your ICC2 controller seamlessly into the world of next-generation irrigation control. The on-screen scheduling works exactly like the dial-based ICC2, with programs A through D, start times, and run times organized the same way they are in the controller. From the user-friendly Centralus dashboard, it is now easier than ever before to add alarm monitoring, location information, remote operation, and scheduling to ICC2 controllers. By adding this WIFI module to an ICC2 controller and a free Centralus account, you can receive SMS text alerts in the event of critical alarms, view complete alarm logs and flow histories in a web browser, use a smart mobile device as a full-featured remote control, and adjust, stop or cancel programmed irrigation as required.

Easy, tool-free installation and configuration connects ICC2 controllers with minimal effort and no guesswork, and include free access to the Centralus web central control platform. Log in to the platform through your Hunter account at hunterindustries.com. If you do not have one, you can create one for free. Direct feedback capabilities are built into the platform, so you can join the conversation and help refine Centralus’ features and capabilities

Name: Hunter ICC2 54 Station Controller with Flow, Stainless Steel Enclosure (I2CF5400SS)
Short description:
This flexible control system can run any combination of conventional, EZDS two-wire, or Wireless Valve Link outputs with built-in flow monitoring and convenient, online control with Centralus Software.
  • 4 independent irrigation programs with 8 start times per program
  • Any 2 programs can operate simultaneously, providing more efficient watering
  • 2 sensor inputs are available: one dedicated flow sensor input and one dedicated weather sensor input for Hunter Clik or Solar Sync  Sensors
  • Built-in flow monitoring for smart water savings
  • Compatible with both EZ Decoder and Wireless Valve Link Systems
Description:
Just like its famous predecessor, the robust ICC2 is a value-packed, light-to-midsize commercial irrigation controller that delivers more than you expect. Designed to control larger projects, it offers two sensor inputs and advanced water savings with built-in flow monitoring. The ICC2 Controller offers control for three different types of output connections, plus a master valve. It can also host conventional, two-wire, and wireless outputs to stations in the field, all in the same installation. Any two of its four automatic programs can run simultaneously, providing flexible and efficient watering options. In addition, the ICC2 facepack and station output modules are backward compatible to original ICC Controllers with upgrade kits available for supporting legacy systems. Secure, cloud-based control and monitoring are available via mobile-friendly Centralus Irrigation Management Software. Choose among three connectivity methods for a variety of applications (Wi-Fi, Ethernet, and 4G LTE Cellular). To simplify system management, the ICC2 Controller comes prewired for remote control with Hunter ROAM and ROAM XL Remotes. Available in plastic outdoor wall mount, metal outdoor wall mount, stainless steel wall mount, or plastic pedestal configurations, this versatile controller also has built-in Solar Sync® Sensor and flow monitoring logic for automatic water savings.
  • 4 independent irrigation programs (8 start times each) allow for customized scheduling
  • 2 sensor inputs available for dedicated flow sensor (HFS or HC Flow) and weather sensor (Clik or Solar Sync) connections
  • Backward compatibility to original ICC Controllers allows for quick updates to older systems
  • Forward compatibility with HCC Controllers and Hydrawise Software using a convenient upgrade kit
  • 12-hour maximum station run times provide flexibility for low-flow zones
  • Any 2 programs can operate simultaneously, providing more efficient watering
  • 1 P/MV output for pump start relay and master valve activation
  • Compatible with EZ Decoder System two-wire and Wireless Valve Link outputs in the same installation

Name: Regency Wire 250' 18-13 13-Strand Muti-Color Black Irrigation Wire Roll (18-130)
Short description:
• Professional-grade multi-color irrigation control wire
  • Solid copper conductors are designed specifically for direct burial landscape applications
  • UL listed for irrigation controller connections up to 30 volts
  • UV-resistant and moisture-resistant black outer jacket for extended durability
  • Individually color-coded internal wires for easy valve identification
  • Premium Service Wire quality backed by industry-leading standards
  • Suitable for residential and commercial irrigation system installations
  • Compatible with all major irrigation controller brands
Description:
Regency Wire's premium multi-conductor irrigation control cable delivers unmatched reliability and performance for demanding irrigation system applications. This professional-grade wire features individually color-coded solid copper conductors protected by a durable black UV-resistant outer jacket, making it the preferred choice of irrigation professionals for direct burial applications in lawn, landscape, and agricultural irrigation systems.

Professional-Grade Regency Wire Quality

Every roll of Regency Wire irrigation cable is manufactured to exceed industry standards, ensuring dependable connections between irrigation controllers and valves. The precision-engineered solid copper conductors deliver superior conductivity while maintaining optimal flexibility for efficient installation. UL listed for irrigation control systems operating at 30 volts or less, this commercial-grade wire provides exceptional performance season after season in the most demanding environmental conditions.

Advanced Color-Coding System

Each internal conductor features unique color insulation following industry-standard color codes, enabling instant identification during initial installation, maintenance, and future troubleshooting. This comprehensive color-coding system simplifies complex multi-zone installations and makes system expansion straightforward, saving valuable time and eliminating costly connection errors.

Superior Construction for Maximum Durability

Specifically engineered for challenging outdoor and underground applications, Regency Wire irrigation cable incorporates:

  • High-performance moisture-resistant materials that prevent corrosion and deterioration
  • Premium UV-stabilized outer jacket engineered to withstand prolonged sun exposure
  • Wide operational temperature rating from -20°F to 160°F (-29°C to 71°C)
  • Optimized flexibility with exceptional tensile strength for easy handling and long-term in-ground reliability
  • Precise and consistent diameter and insulation thickness for uniform performance
  • Enhanced abrasion resistance for installation in challenging soil conditions

Versatile Applications

Regency Wire irrigation control cable excels in numerous applications:

  • New irrigation system installations from residential to commercial scale
  • Expanding or upgrading existing multi-zone sprinkler systems
  • Replacing damaged or deteriorated control wires in existing systems
  • Commercial, municipal, and agricultural irrigation networks
  • Golf courses and sports field irrigation systems
  • Large-scale landscape projects requiring multiple control zones
  • Complex irrigation systems with central computerized controllers
  • Direct burial in soil or installation within protective conduit

Professional Installation Best Practices

For optimal performance and system longevity:

  1. Always install in conduit when crossing hardscapes, high-traffic areas, or where future access may be needed
  2. Maintain a minimum burial depth of 6-12 inches, depending on local conditions and freeze depth
  3. Use only waterproof direct-burial wire connectors with corrosion inhibitors at all splice points
  4. Include service loops with extra wire length at each valve box and controller connection
  5. Maintain comprehensive documentation of wire routing, color coding, and zone assignments
  6. Avoid sharp bends and excessive tension during installation that could damage conductors
  7. Test the continuity of each conductor before and after installation to verify system integrity

The Regency Wire Advantage

For over four decades, Regency Wire has been the trusted name in irrigation control cable, delivering products that exceed the expectations of irrigation professionals. Our multi-conductor irrigation cables are manufactured in ISO-certified facilities using premium materials and rigorous quality control procedures. Name: Hunter ST-1700-V 5" Pop-Up 40° to 360° Synthetic Turf Rotor (ST1700V)
Short description:
• Nozzle choices: 5 options ranging from nozzles 16 to 24
  • Nozzle trajectory: 25°
  • Total-Top-Service (TTS) design provides convenient, no-dig servicing
  • Valve-in-head configuration simplifies installation
  • Isolated, grease-lubricated gear drive provides smooth operation
  • Arc adjustment: movable stops for left/right arc adjustment
Description:
The ST-1700-V long-range synthetic turf rotor offers high-performance irrigation from the field perimeter while integrating Valve-in-Head (VIH) capabilities and a Total-Top-Service (TTS) design to simplify installation and maintenance. The ST-1700-V is a great choice for cooling, cleaning, flushing, and surface preparation for synthetic sports fields.

The rotor has a heavy-duty gear drive that provides power and performance in the field. The VIH design integrates the control valve, solenoid, and manual On-Off-Auto selector within the rotor’s heavy-duty, impact-resistant case to create convenient and compact design appreciated by installers and end users.

With TTS technology, every serviceable component can be accessed from the surface without cutting into the synthetic turf. In addition, the spacious flange compartment can accommodate full-sized waterproof splice connectors, and a cradle in the compartment can nest a decoder for two-wire control system applications.

  • Radius: 105' to 157'
  • Flow: 92.4 to 258.7 GPM
  • Operating pressure range: 60 to 115 PSI
  • Arc setting: 40° to non-reversing 360°
  • Speed of rotation: 80 seconds at 90 PSI (single 180° sweep)
  • Precipitation rate: 1.8 in/hr approximately

Made from UV- and chemical-resistant materials, these fittings are built to withstand the toughest outdoor conditions, offering long-lasting performance in residential or commercial landscapes.

Whether you're installing new drip zones or making upgrades to an existing system, the PLD-LOC-ELB elbow makes installation fast, clean, and efficient.

Name: Hunter ET-SENSOR Weather Control for ET System and Hunter Controllers (ET-SENSOR)
Short description:
• Provides automatic weather adjustment for IMMS central control systems
  • Monitors climate conditions and measures evapotranspiration (ET) and rainfall
  • Includes sensors for solar radiation, air temperature, relative humidity, and rainfall
  • Optional ET Wind includes the actual wind speed
  • Computes modi ed Penman-Monteith ET for software application amounts
  • Connects to the Hunter ACC controller for communications with the central control software
  • Virtually unlimited number of sensors per system (one per microclimate recommended)
  • Includes universal mounting hardware
Description: The Hunter ET Sensor is designed specifically for use with IMMS central control systems, exclusively with ACC controllers. ET Sensor uses solar radiation, air temperature, relative humidity, and wind (either average, or actual with the optional ET Wind sensor) to calculate evapotranspiration and communicate it to the central software via the host controller's communication. Hunter's IMMS-ET software calculates new application amounts and run times for each station, and downloads them back to all ACC controllers. ET Sensor also measures actual rainfall, which is applied to the soil reservoir before new application amounts are calculated. One ET Sensor per micro-climate is all that is needed and recommended, with a virtually unlimited number possible per central control system.

Name: Hunter Drip ECO-MAT 17mm Subsurface Drip Mat 32” x 200’ Roll (ECOMAT17200)
Short description:
Irrigate plants below the root zone for maximum efficiency with a combination of fleece-wrapped dripline and fleece blanket

  • Anti-siphon feature and fleece wrap protect against debris and root intrusion
  • Saves 20–40% more water than standard products due to superior capillary movement of water to the entire root zone, promoting healthier root growth
  • Non-draining, pressure-compensating emitters open/close simultaneously, maximizing efficiency
  • Check the height of 6' minimizes system drainage and runoff
Description:
Designed to suit a variety of hard-to-irrigate areas, the Eco-Mat uses a specifically engineered combination of inline emitter tubing and fleece, which evenly disperses water from under the surface. Eco-Mat consists of Hunter's specialized fleece-wrapped inline emitter tubing (Eco-Wrap), attached to specialized fleece. Eco-Mat is then installed in the soil to be irrigated, directly under the plant material. When water is emitted, the Eco-Wrap fills and in turn, saturates the Eco-Mat. The Eco-Mat not only makes subsurface drip a viable solution, but it also makes it a great one. Since there's never water on the surface, high-traffic turf areas in places like amusement parks, city parks, and commercial complexes can be used all day without the need to budget time for overhead irrigation or worry about vandalism.

OPERATING SPECIFICATIONS

  • Operating range: 15 to 50 PSI
  • Minimum filtration: 120 mesh (125 microns)
  • Compatible with LOC and 17 mm insert barb fittings
  • Air relief is recommended for sloping conditions greater than 6'
  • Recommended installation depth: turf (4" to 6"); other (4" to 14")
  • May use in conjunction with Eco-Wrap System
  • Warranty period: 5 years (plus 2 additional years for environmental stress cracking)

PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS

  • Flow rate: 0.6 GPH; 0.83 in/hr
  • Emitter spacing: 12"
  • Lateral row spacing: 14"
  • Product width: 32"
  • Roll length: mini roll = 100'; standard roll = 295'
  • Tubing dimensions: 0.660" x 0.560" (outside/inside diameter)
  • Water-holding capacity: 0.5 gallons
  • The approximate coverage per roll: mini roll = 250 ft2;
    Standard roll = 737 ft2
  • Example calculation based on area 40' x 80':
    Roll = Irrigated landscape area = Qty. Area of roll coverage
    3,200 ft2
    = 4.34 (round up to 5 rolls)

Name: Hunter Pro-C PCC600i Indoor 6 Station Controller (PCC-600i)
Short description:
Hunter Pro-C Fixed Indoor Irrigation Controller Gray, Indoor Mount with 120 VAC Internal Transformer
  • Flexible irrigation management for a range of station counts and applications
  • Pro-C Controller: conventional wiring up to 6 stations
  • 3 independent irrigation programs with 4 start times each allow for fully customized scheduling
  • 1 sensor input available for use with the Hunter Solar Sync Sensor or any Hunter Clik sensors
  • 1 P/MV output for pump start relay and master valve activation
  • Dedicated Solar Sync dial position available to maximize water savings
Description:
Since 2001, the Hunter Pro-C has been the contractor’s choice in residential irrigation control. The Hunter Pro-C has proven to be the most reliable and robust controller in the industry. The Hunter Pro-C can easily accommodate Hunter’s Solar Sync® without additional wiring. The new Solar Sync dial position makes upgrading and programming any Hunter Pro-C to smart control easy. The Hunter Solar Sync is an EPA WaterSense® labeled smart device which calculates evapotranspiration (ET) and adjusts Hunter controllers daily based on local weather conditions, resulting in water savings and conservation. The Hunter Pro-C and all AC-powered Hunter controllers are now EPA WaterSense labeled when paired with the Solar Sync weather sensor. FEATURES
  • Number of stations: 6
  • Independent irrigation programs: 3
  • Independent lighting programs: 3
  • Start times per program: 4
  • Max. station run time: 6 hours
  • Solar Sync dial position: now available with built-in Solar Sync programming for increased installation efficiency
  • Solar Sync delay feature: allows adjustments to be postponed for up to 99 days
  • Cycle and Soak feature built-in: reduces runoff
  • Lighting programs built in: allows the ability to add landscape lighting control
  • Added knockouts offer additional flexibility
  • Programmable rain delay: prevents watering for an extended period as needed
  • Non-volatile memory: keeps programs indefinitely— without battery backup
  • Rain sensor bypass: allows the controller to ignore sensor devices when needed
  • One-touch manual start and advance: allows user to start or test any station
  • Warranty period: 2 years

ADVANCED FEATURES IN HUNTER PRO-C

WATERSENSE® SMART WATERING CONTROLLER BY ADDING SOLAR SYNC

Add a Solar Sync® Sensor to your Hunter controller to enable automatic smart control and maximize water savings. Solar Sync measures local weather conditions to help the controller fine-tune watering schedules according to exact site needs. Hunter controllers installed with Solar Sync are independently verified to offer an extensive list of water-saving features. Solar Sync is EPA WaterSense® approved. Click here to learn more about Smart Controllers

EASY RETRIEVE™ MEMORY

A manual backup utility that stores complete controller scheduling and setup information in backup memory.

AUTOMATIC SHORT CIRCUIT PROTECTION

Automatic short circuit protection is a feature found in all Hunter AC-powered controllers. This feature automatically detects electrical faults, which are typically caused by wiring issues. Only affected stations are skipped, allowing all other stations to water normally as programmed.

QUICK CHECK™

The QuickCheck feature makes field wiring issues easy to assess with the push of a button. QuickCheck displays an ERR message when a field wiring short is detected on a particular station number.

SEASONAL ADJUSTMENT: GLOBAL OR AUTOMATIC UPDATES WITH SOLAR SYNC

This feature allows for quick adjustment to irrigation run times based on seasonal weather conditions. Global: The Global option provides a Seasonal Adjustment percentage to all station Run Times on all of the controller's Programs. Daily: With the addition of a Solar Sync ET Sensor, the controller has the ability to automatically implement daily adjustments based on measured local weather.

DELAY BETWEEN STATIONS

Users can program a delay between stations as the controller advances from one station to the next. This delay can range from a few seconds (to permit slow-closing valves additional time to close) to a much longer period of time (to allow pressure tanks time to recharge), based on user requirements.

SENSOR PROGRAMMABILITY

The ability to specify which program will be shut down in response to a specific sensor alarm. This allows programs unaffected by the sensor to continue automatic operations.

NON-WATER DAYS

Day(s) of the week can be programmed OFF in advance so that irrigation does not occur regardless of program interval schedules. For example, if the gardener mows the lawn on Saturday, the Non-Water Days feature allows Saturday to be programmed OFF so that watering will not occur. Simple programming makes the Pro-C Controller the professional’s choice for residential and light commercial irrigation systems. Gain Long-Range Control with Hunter ROAM Remotes - Enable convenient, long-range manual operation, maintenance, and service for quick and easy system inspections and maintenance, Hunter ROAM and ROAM XL Remotes help save time and labor on the Jobsite

Name: Hunter ROAM LR Remote Kit, 2 Mile Long Range Remote for X2, Pro-C, HPC, HCC, ICC2, ACC2 (ROAM-LR-KIT)
Short description:
• 2-Mile Wireless Range - Control irrigation controllers up to 2 miles away using license-free LoRa technology
  • No Monthly Fees - Zero subscription costs, no data plans, no recurring charges ever
  • Manual Override Capability - Run zones 1-90 minutes without disrupting automatic schedules
  • Universal Hunter Compatibility - Works with X2, Pro-C, HPC, HCC, ICC2, and ACC2 controllers
  • Weather-Resistant Design - IP55-rated transmitter and receiver for reliable outdoor performance
  • Professional Grade - Perfect for golf courses, commercial landscapes, sports fields, and large properties
  • Complete Kit Included - Transmitter, receiver, SmartPort harness, batteries, and 3-year warranty
  • Easy Installation - SmartPort connection installs in minutes, no technical expertise required
Description:
The ROAM LR Remote is the ultimate tool for irrigation pros who manage large-scale sites. Offering professional, license-free control up to 2 miles, this long-range remote eliminates the need to visit most SmartPort enabled Hunter controllers for maintenance, ensuring seamless troubleshooting and seasonal upkeep without extra steps. Rugged, reliable and ready to travel between jobs, the ROAM LR is designed to cover more ground - so you don't have to.

Stop Walking Miles to Adjust Your Irrigation Controllers

The Hunter ROAM LR long-range irrigation remote is the ultimate wireless control solution for irrigation professionals managing large-scale properties. Whether you're maintaining golf courses, sports complexes, commercial landscapes, or municipal parks, this professional-grade remote eliminates unnecessary site visits and dramatically reduces maintenance time and labor costs.

Professional Long-Range Control Up to 2 Miles

Using advanced LoRa (Long Range) radio technology operating at 915 MHz, the ROAM LR delivers dependable wireless control up to 2 miles (line of sight) between transmitter and receiver. Unlike cellular-based irrigation control systems, there are no monthly subscription fees, no signal dropouts, and no reliance on internet connectivity. Simply pair the transmitter with your compatible Hunter controller's SmartPort connection and gain instant remote access from anywhere on your property.

Control your irrigation zones from your truck, maintenance facility, or while conducting site inspections—saving valuable time and reducing the need to physically visit every controller location for routine adjustments, testing, or troubleshooting.

Who This Remote Is For

Perfect for Irrigation Professionals Managing:

  • Golf courses with 18+ holes and multiple controller locations
  • Large commercial properties and office parks
  • Sports field complexes with spread-out irrigation zones
  • Municipal parks and recreation facilities
  • Educational campuses with extensive grounds
  • HOA common areas and community landscapes
  • Any property where controllers are located far apart

Key Features & Benefits

Universal Hunter Controller Compatibility

Works seamlessly with Hunter's SmartPort-enabled controllers including X2, Pro-C, HPC, HCC, ICC2, and ACC2 models. One ROAM LR transmitter can manage multiple receivers installed on different controllers throughout your entire property, making it ideal for large installations with dozens of irrigation zones across multiple buildings or areas.

Manual Override Without Programming Disruption

Set manual run times from 1 to 90 minutes per station without overwriting your existing automatic irrigation schedules. This feature is perfect for testing repairs after service calls, flushing lines to clear debris, demonstrating system functionality to clients, or providing supplemental water during heat waves—all while keeping your regular watering programs completely intact.

Zero Monthly Fees or Subscription Costs

Unlike WiFi-based or cellular irrigation control systems that require ongoing data plans, the ROAM LR uses license-free LoRa radio frequency technology. You pay once and own it forever with no recurring monthly fees, no annual contracts, no data plan requirements, and no connectivity headaches. This makes the ROAM LR a cost-effective long-term investment for any irrigation operation.

Weather-Resistant Professional Construction

Both the handheld transmitter and controller-mounted receiver feature IP55 weatherproof ratings, ensuring reliable operation in dust, rain, mud, and harsh outdoor field conditions. The ergonomic transmitter runs on 4 AAA batteries (included) for portable convenience, while the receiver operates on standard 24 VAC power supplied directly from your irrigation controller.

Quick and Easy Installation

The receiver module connects to your existing Hunter controller via the included SmartPort wiring harness and can be mounted up to 50 feet from the controller for optimal signal reception. No complex programming or technical expertise required—setup takes minutes, not hours. The intuitive transmitter interface makes operation simple for any crew member.

Save Time and Reduce Labor Costs

Stop wasting valuable hours driving between controller locations. With 2-mile wireless range, irrigation technicians can troubleshoot problems, test zones, and make adjustments without leaving their vehicle. For a typical 18-hole golf course, this can save 10-15 hours per week in travel time alone, translating to thousands of dollars in annual labor savings.

Technical Specifications

  • Maximum Wireless Range: 2 miles (line-of-sight conditions)
  • Radio Technology: LoRa (Long Range) at 915 MHz, license-free
  • Compatible Controllers: Hunter X2, Pro-C, HPC, HCC, ICC2, ACC2 (SmartPort-enabled models)
  • Manual Run Time: Adjustable from 1 to 90 minutes per station
  • Transmitter Power Source: 4 AAA batteries (included in kit)
  • Receiver Power Requirements: 24 VAC, 0.10 A (powered by controller)
  • SmartPort Harness Maximum Length: 50 feet from controller
  • Weather Protection Rating: IP55 (dust-protected and water-resistant)
  • Regulatory Compliance: FCC approved for USA use
  • Warranty Coverage: 3-year manufacturer's warranty

What's Included in the Box

  • 1x ROAM LR Handheld Transmitter
  • 1x ROAM LR Receiver Module
  • 1x SmartPort Wiring Harness (50 ft)
  • 4x AAA Batteries
  • Mounting Hardware
  • Quick Start Installation Guide
  • 3-Year Manufacturer Warranty Card

Real-World Applications

Golf Course Superintendents: Manage irrigation across all 18 holes from the maintenance facility. Quickly respond to dry spots or overwatering complaints without driving the entire course.

Commercial Landscape Contractors: Service multiple properties efficiently. Test systems after repairs and demonstrate functionality to clients without walking the entire site.

Sports Field Managers: Coordinate irrigation between multiple fields during tournaments and events. Make real-time adjustments without interrupting play.

Municipal Parks Departments: Manage irrigation across spread-out park facilities from a central location. Reduce fuel costs and vehicle wear from unnecessary site visits.

Large Property Managers: Control irrigation for office parks, shopping centers, and multi-building campuses without visiting every controller location.

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How far does the ROAM LR actually work in real conditions? A: The ROAM LR provides up to 2 miles of range in line-of-sight conditions. Real-world performance depends on terrain, buildings, trees, and other obstructions. Most customers achieve 1-1.5 miles of reliable range in typical commercial landscape settings with some obstacles.

Q: Can I use one remote with multiple controllers? A: Yes! One ROAM LR transmitter can communicate with multiple receiver modules installed on different controllers throughout your property. This makes it perfect for large facilities with numerous irrigation zones.

Q: Will manual runs erase my automatic watering schedule?
A: No. The ROAM LR manual override feature allows you to run individual stations for 1-90 minutes without affecting your programmed automatic irrigation schedules. Your regular watering times remain completely intact.

Q: Does this work with other brands of irrigation controllers? A: No. The ROAM LR is designed exclusively for Hunter controllers with SmartPort connectivity, including X2, Pro-C, HPC, HCC, ICC2, and ACC2 models. It will not work with Rain Bird, Toro, or other manufacturers' controllers.

Q: Are there monthly fees or subscription costs? A: Absolutely not. The ROAM LR uses license-free LoRa radio technology with zero monthly fees, no annual subscriptions, and no data plan requirements—ever. You pay once and own it forever.

Q: Is this legal to use in my area? A: The ROAM LR is FCC approved for use throughout the United States. It operates on license-free 915 MHz frequency bands. However, it's not available in the European Union and some other countries due to different frequency regulations. Check local regulations if you're outside the USA.

Q: How long do the batteries last? A: Battery life depends on usage frequency. With typical professional use (multiple activations per day), expect 6-12 months of operation from the included AAA batteries. The transmitter provides low-battery warnings before power runs out.

Q: What is the warranty coverage? A: The ROAM LR includes a comprehensive 3-year manufacturer warranty from Hunter Industries covering defects in materials and workmanship. This demonstrates Hunter's confidence in the product's professional-grade reliability.

Why Choose the Hunter ROAM LR

Hunter Industries has been the trusted name in irrigation technology for over 35 years. The ROAM LR represents the latest advancement in professional irrigation management, combining proven reliability with cutting-edge wireless technology. When you invest in Hunter products, you're choosing:

  • Proven Reliability: Backed by decades of irrigation industry leadership
  • Professional-Grade Quality: Built to withstand daily commercial use
  • Extensive Compatibility: Works with multiple Hunter controller models
  • Outstanding Support: Industry-leading customer service and technical support
  • Long-Term Value: No subscription fees means lower total cost of ownership

Order Your Hunter ROAM LR Today

Take control of your large-scale irrigation management with the professional wireless solution trusted by golf courses, commercial landscapers, and property managers nationwide. Experience the time savings, labor cost reduction, and operational efficiency that comes with 2-mile wireless control.

Description:
The ROAM LR Remote is the ultimate tool for irrigation pros who manage large-scale sites. Offering professional, license-free control up to 2 miles, this long-range remote eliminates the need to visit most SmartPort enabled Hunter controllers for maintenance, ensuring seamless troubleshooting and seasonal upkeep without extra steps. Rugged, reliable and ready to travel between jobs, the ROAM LR is designed to cover more ground - so you don't have to.

Stop Walking Miles to Adjust Your Irrigation Controllers

The Hunter ROAM LR long-range irrigation remote is the ultimate wireless control solution for irrigation professionals managing large-scale properties. Whether you're maintaining golf courses, sports complexes, commercial landscapes, or municipal parks, this professional-grade remote eliminates unnecessary site visits and dramatically reduces maintenance time and labor costs.

Professional Long-Range Control Up to 2 Miles

Using advanced LoRa (Long Range) radio technology operating at 915 MHz, the ROAM LR delivers dependable wireless control up to 2 miles (line of sight) between transmitter and receiver. Unlike cellular-based irrigation control systems, there are no monthly subscription fees, no signal dropouts, and no reliance on internet connectivity. Simply pair the transmitter with your compatible Hunter controller's SmartPort connection and gain instant remote access from anywhere on your property.

Control your irrigation zones from your truck, maintenance facility, or while conducting site inspections—saving valuable time and reducing the need to physically visit every controller location for routine adjustments, testing, or troubleshooting.

Who This Remote Is For

Perfect for Irrigation Professionals Managing:

  • Golf courses with 18+ holes and multiple controller locations
  • Large commercial properties and office parks
  • Sports field complexes with spread-out irrigation zones
  • Municipal parks and recreation facilities
  • Educational campuses with extensive grounds
  • HOA common areas and community landscapes
  • Any property where controllers are located far apart

Key Features & Benefits

Universal Hunter Controller Compatibility

Works seamlessly with Hunter's SmartPort-enabled controllers including X2, Pro-C, HPC, HCC, ICC2, and ACC2 models. One ROAM LR transmitter can manage multiple receivers installed on different controllers throughout your entire property, making it ideal for large installations with dozens of irrigation zones across multiple buildings or areas.

Manual Override Without Programming Disruption

Set manual run times from 1 to 90 minutes per station without overwriting your existing automatic irrigation schedules. This feature is perfect for testing repairs after service calls, flushing lines to clear debris, demonstrating system functionality to clients, or providing supplemental water during heat waves—all while keeping your regular watering programs completely intact.

Zero Monthly Fees or Subscription Costs

Unlike WiFi-based or cellular irrigation control systems that require ongoing data plans, the ROAM LR uses license-free LoRa radio frequency technology. You pay once and own it forever with no recurring monthly fees, no annual contracts, no data plan requirements, and no connectivity headaches. This makes the ROAM LR a cost-effective long-term investment for any irrigation operation.

Weather-Resistant Professional Construction

Both the handheld transmitter and controller-mounted receiver feature IP55 weatherproof ratings, ensuring reliable operation in dust, rain, mud, and harsh outdoor field conditions. The ergonomic transmitter runs on 4 AAA batteries (included) for portable convenience, while the receiver operates on standard 24 VAC power supplied directly from your irrigation controller.

Quick and Easy Installation

The receiver module connects to your existing Hunter controller via the included SmartPort wiring harness and can be mounted up to 50 feet from the controller for optimal signal reception. No complex programming or technical expertise required—setup takes minutes, not hours. The intuitive transmitter interface makes operation simple for any crew member.

Save Time and Reduce Labor Costs

Stop wasting valuable hours driving between controller locations. With 2-mile wireless range, irrigation technicians can troubleshoot problems, test zones, and make adjustments without leaving their vehicle. For a typical 18-hole golf course, this can save 10-15 hours per week in travel time alone, translating to thousands of dollars in annual labor savings.

Technical Specifications

  • Maximum Wireless Range: 2 miles (line-of-sight conditions)
  • Radio Technology: LoRa (Long Range) at 915 MHz, license-free
  • Compatible Controllers: Hunter X2, Pro-C, HPC, HCC, ICC2, ACC2 (SmartPort-enabled models)
  • Manual Run Time: Adjustable from 1 to 90 minutes per station
  • Transmitter Power Source: 4 AAA batteries (included in kit)
  • Receiver Power Requirements: 24 VAC, 0.10 A (powered by controller)
  • SmartPort Harness Maximum Length: 50 feet from controller
  • Weather Protection Rating: IP55 (dust-protected and water-resistant)
  • Regulatory Compliance: FCC approved for USA use
  • Warranty Coverage: 3-year manufacturer's warranty

What's Included in the Box

  • 1x ROAM LR Handheld Transmitter
  • 1x ROAM LR Receiver Module
  • 1x SmartPort Wiring Harness (50 ft)
  • 4x AAA Batteries
  • Mounting Hardware
  • Quick Start Installation Guide
  • 3-Year Manufacturer Warranty Card

Real-World Applications

Golf Course Superintendents: Manage irrigation across all 18 holes from the maintenance facility. Quickly respond to dry spots or overwatering complaints without driving the entire course.

Commercial Landscape Contractors: Service multiple properties efficiently. Test systems after repairs and demonstrate functionality to clients without walking the entire site.

Sports Field Managers: Coordinate irrigation between multiple fields during tournaments and events. Make real-time adjustments without interrupting play.

Municipal Parks Departments: Manage irrigation across spread-out park facilities from a central location. Reduce fuel costs and vehicle wear from unnecessary site visits.

Large Property Managers: Control irrigation for office parks, shopping centers, and multi-building campuses without visiting every controller location.

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How far does the ROAM LR actually work in real conditions? A: The ROAM LR provides up to 2 miles of range in line-of-sight conditions. Real-world performance depends on terrain, buildings, trees, and other obstructions. Most customers achieve 1-1.5 miles of reliable range in typical commercial landscape settings with some obstacles.

Q: Can I use one remote with multiple controllers? A: Yes! One ROAM LR transmitter can communicate with multiple receiver modules installed on different controllers throughout your property. This makes it perfect for large facilities with numerous irrigation zones.

Q: Will manual runs erase my automatic watering schedule?
A: No. The ROAM LR manual override feature allows you to run individual stations for 1-90 minutes without affecting your programmed automatic irrigation schedules. Your regular watering times remain completely intact.

Q: Does this work with other brands of irrigation controllers? A: No. The ROAM LR is designed exclusively for Hunter controllers with SmartPort connectivity, including X2, Pro-C, HPC, HCC, ICC2, and ACC2 models. It will not work with Rain Bird, Toro, or other manufacturers' controllers.

Q: Are there monthly fees or subscription costs? A: Absolutely not. The ROAM LR uses license-free LoRa radio technology with zero monthly fees, no annual subscriptions, and no data plan requirements—ever. You pay once and own it forever.

Q: Is this legal to use in my area? A: The ROAM LR is FCC approved for use throughout the United States. It operates on license-free 915 MHz frequency bands. However, it's not available in the European Union and some other countries due to different frequency regulations. Check local regulations if you're outside the USA.

Q: How long do the batteries last? A: Battery life depends on usage frequency. With typical professional use (multiple activations per day), expect 6-12 months of operation from the included AAA batteries. The transmitter provides low-battery warnings before power runs out.

Q: What is the warranty coverage? A: The ROAM LR includes a comprehensive 3-year manufacturer warranty from Hunter Industries covering defects in materials and workmanship. This demonstrates Hunter's confidence in the product's professional-grade reliability.

Why Choose the Hunter ROAM LR

Hunter Industries has been the trusted name in irrigation technology for over 35 years. The ROAM LR represents the latest advancement in professional irrigation management, combining proven reliability with cutting-edge wireless technology. When you invest in Hunter products, you're choosing:

  • Proven Reliability: Backed by decades of irrigation industry leadership
  • Professional-Grade Quality: Built to withstand daily commercial use
  • Extensive Compatibility: Works with multiple Hunter controller models
  • Outstanding Support: Industry-leading customer service and technical support
  • Long-Term Value: No subscription fees means lower total cost of ownership

Order Your Hunter ROAM LR Today

Take control of your large-scale irrigation management with the professional wireless solution trusted by golf courses, commercial landscapers, and property managers nationwide. Experience the time savings, labor cost reduction, and operational efficiency that comes with 2-mile wireless control.

Name: FX Luminaire 752605 LED Programming Adapter
Short description: Simplify LED fixture programming with the FX Luminaire LED Programming Adapter. This essential Luxor system accessory enables quick and easy group assignments at your Luxor Controller without accessing fixture wire leads, making post-installation programming and retrofit projects more efficient.
Description:
The FX Luminaire LED Programming Adapter (Part #752605) is a professional-grade tool designed to streamline the programming process for Luxor landscape lighting systems. This adapter eliminates the need to work directly with fixture wire leads, providing a faster, cleaner method for assigning LED boards to groups at the Luxor Controller.

Key Features

Simplified Group Assignment: Program LED fixtures and boards directly at the controller without handling wire leads from installed fixtures.

Post-Installation Programming: Ideal for assigning fixtures after they've been installed in the landscape, eliminating the need to access buried or hard-to-reach wiring.

Retrofit-Friendly Design: Perfect for upgrading existing installations or adding new fixtures to established Luxor lighting systems.

Compatible Technology: Works seamlessly with FX Luminaire ZD and ZDC LED boards and fixtures throughout the Luxor ecosystem.

Professional Efficiency: Reduces programming time and complexity, allowing landscape lighting professionals to complete installations faster.

How It Works

The LED Programming Adapter connects between your Luxor Controller's assignment ports and the LED board you're programming. Instead of removing fixtures from the field or accessing wire connections, simply plug the adapter into the controller's programming ports, connect to the LED board, and assign the fixture to the desired group through the controller interface.

Applications

Post-installation group assignments and modifications Landscape lighting system retrofits and upgrades Adding new fixtures to existing Luxor systems Troubleshooting and reassigning fixture groups Professional installation workflow optimization

Compatibility

Works with all Luxor Controllers featuring assignment ports Compatible with FX Luminaire ZD Technology LED boards Compatible with FX Luminaire ZDC Technology LED boards Supports all Luxor group programming features including dimming and color control

Why Choose the LED Programming Adapter

For landscape lighting professionals and installers, the LED Programming Adapter represents a significant time-saving tool. Traditional fixture programming requires accessing wire leads at each fixture location, which can be challenging after installation is complete. This adapter brings the programming interface to the controller, where you can work comfortably and efficiently.

Whether you're completing a new installation, performing a system retrofit, or adding fixtures to an existing Luxor landscape lighting system, the LED Programming Adapter streamlines your workflow and reduces the complexity of group assignments.

Technical Specifications

Name: Hunter 440200 Mini-Clik Rain Sensor Cap and Spindle Assembly
Short description: Restore your Hunter Mini-Clik rain sensor to peak performance with the genuine 440200 Cap and Spindle Assembly. This OEM replacement part includes fresh hygroscopic discs and spindle components, allowing you to repair your sensor instead of replacing the entire unit. Save money and extend the life of your irrigation rain sensor with this easy-to-install repair kit.
Description:
The Hunter 440200 Cap and Spindle Assembly is the official replacement component for Mini-Clik rain sensors that have worn out or stopped functioning properly. This genuine Hunter Industries part restores your rain sensor's ability to accurately detect rainfall and prevent unnecessary irrigation, helping you conserve water and protect your landscape from overwatering.

Rather than replacing your entire Mini-Clik rain sensor, this affordable repair kit provides everything you need to bring your existing sensor back to factory specifications. The assembly includes the top cap, spindle mechanism, and most importantly, new hygroscopic discs that are critical to proper rain detection.

Key Features

Genuine OEM Hunter Industries Part: Factory-quality replacement ensures perfect fit and reliable performance with your existing Mini-Clik rain sensor.

Complete Cap and Spindle Assembly: Includes all necessary components, including fresh hygroscopic discs, spindle, cap, and hardware for a complete repair.

Cost-Effective Solution: Repair your existing rain sensor for a fraction of the cost of purchasing a new complete unit.

Easy Installation: Simple twist-on/twist-off design allows for quick replacement without special tools or technical expertise.

Restores Accurate Rain Detection: New hygroscopic discs properly expand when wet and contract when dry, ensuring your sensor responds correctly to rainfall.

Compatible with All Mini-Clik Models: Works with all Hunter Mini-Clik rain sensor variants, including hardwired and wireless versions.

Why Replace Your Cap and Spindle Assembly

Over time, the hygroscopic discs inside your Mini-Clik rain sensor can wear out, become contaminated with dirt and debris, or lose their ability to properly expand and contract. When this happens, your rain sensor may fail to shut off your irrigation system during rainfall, or it may falsely trigger and prevent watering when it's dry.

Signs that indicate your hygroscopic discs need replacement include the sensor not responding to rainfall or staying activated even when completely dry. Before replacing the entire sensor unit, the 440200 Cap and Spindle Assembly offers an economical repair option that addresses the most common failure points.
